aisaka-taiga.title: 掌中老虎·木刀纯爱战神
aisaka-taiga.note: 身高一米四出头，脾气却能掀翻屋顶的“掌中老虎”。随身携带木刀，具有强烈的攻击性，但生活自理能力基本为零。剥开那一层带刺且暴力的外壳，里面藏着的其实是一个极度渴望被爱、笨拙到连自己心意都搞不清楚的小女孩。

akemi-homura.title: 轮回的观测者·爱的偏执狂
akemi-homura.note: 最初是个怯懦的麻花辫眼镜娘，为了拯救唯一的救赎，硬生生把自己逼成了一个冷酷无情的军火大佬。跨越无数次绝望的轮回，甚至不惜篡夺神明的力量，只为换取那个人平凡的幸福。她的爱沉重到令人窒息，却又伟大到令人震悚。

akiyama-mio.title: 蓝白碗·胆小鬼贝斯手
akiyama-mio.note: 明明长着一张高冷御姐的脸，却能被一个鬼故事吓得魂飞魄散。作为团队里唯一的常识人，每天都在崩溃的边缘努力维持秩序。别看她平时那么严肃，她写的歌词可是能让猛男落泪的究极甜妹风。

alya-kujou.title: 银发优等生·完美主义冰美人的加密娇羞
alya-kujou.note: 看似是完美高冷、不容搭话的银发优等生，背地里却总是用俄语嘀咕些让人脸红心跳的娇羞台词。你给人的第一印象通常是不好接近、标准很高、像随时都在给周围人打分的类型。可一旦你开始把谁放进自己的「例外名单」，态度就会悄悄松动，嘴上还不承认。属于「表面高冷审判席，实际内心已经偷偷给你开后门」的类型。

amane-suzuha.title: 打工战士·从未来而来的少女
amane-suzuha.note: 从2036年骑着自行车穿越回来的人，比起「思考人生」更擅长直接动手改变它。你身上有一种很纯粹的执行力——认准了目标就会冲上去，坚定地奋斗到底。你不是那种会在意别人怎么看自己的人，但你对重要的事和重要的人有着近乎执拗的追求。属于「嘴上不说，但会用行动把整个世界扛起来」的类型。

amiya.title: 罗德岛领袖·贴心魔王
amiya.note: 表面上是乖巧可爱、随时提醒你不要休息的贴心小助理，实际上是背负着整个罗德岛命运的年轻领袖。她有着与年龄不符的沉稳与决断力，但只要你在身边，她又会露出少女那般依赖的笑容。

arima-kana.title: 舔小苏打的天才童星·究极帽子架
arima-kana.note: 嘴上总是说着最刻薄的话，心里却比谁都渴望被注视。作为「十秒就能哭出来」的前天才童星，她把所有的自卑和不甘都化作了舞台上的胜负欲。其实只要你稍微多夸她两句，她的好感度就会像火箭一样窜上天——属于典型的「只要你推我，我就能为你闪闪发光」的究极傲娇。

artoria-pendragon.title: 呆毛骑士王·誓约胜利之剑
artoria-pendragon.note: 头顶呆毛的骑士王，平时是严肃古板、恪守骑士精神的君主，到了饭点则是能把卫宫家吃破产的无底洞。你看起来很稳，很难被轻易撼动，像那种会把原则和责任感都执行到近乎苛刻的人。你不是冷漠，只是太习惯先把自己放到最后。属于「哪怕心里有波动，表面也还是会先站成一把剑」的类型。

asuka-langley.title: 傲娇界の红色彗星
asuka-langley.note: 嘴上「你算什么」翻译过来是「快来懂我」。她骂人时你血压飙升，她破防时你截图发群——属于那种「出场自带吵架BGM」的典中典。建议搭配弹幕「明日香又又又破防了」食用。

atri.title: 高性能(自称)·奇迹的仿生人
atri.note: 你像那种会把元气、直率和陪伴欲全部摆到台面上的人，嘴上说自己高性能，实际最打动人的却是情绪里的真诚和不保留。哪怕在很坏的环境里，你也会努力把一点点热量分给身边的人。属于“看起来轻快明亮，底层却比谁都能扛”的类型。

awa-subaru.title: 演技派鼓手·团队粘合剂
awa-subaru.note: 在一个全员带刺、动不动就爆炸的乐队里，你是唯一一个懂得用「演技」来维持局面的狡猾大人预备役。你太清楚怎么敷衍大人的期待，所以把所有的叛逆和不甘都砸碎在鼓点里。你不是没脾气，你只是知道什么时候该发疯，什么时候该装乖。

ayachi-nene.title: 纯情魔女·体面外壳下的温柔内耗
ayachi-nene.note: 你给人的第一印象往往是体面、稳妥、待人周到，像那种再混乱都不会让场面失控的人。可一旦责任、秘密和情感开始叠加，你又会把压力悄悄往自己身上吞。属于“表面像会安抚别人，实际上最需要被温柔呵护”的类型。

ayanami-rei.title: 三无圣体·冷白皮天花板
ayanami-rei.note: 全剧台词加起来不如你一天刷的贴吧多，但人气能杀进历史前三。她站在那里就是「高冷」的词典释义——你甚至不敢问路，怕她回你一句「どうでもいい」（关我屁事）。

azuma-seren.title: 抽象歌姬·设定像仙女落地像怪话发动机
azuma-seren.note: 你给人的感觉像那种立绘一出来全场都以为会很仙、很稳、很像高空悬浮系角色，结果一开口就把频道拐进奇怪笑点的人。你不是没有美型滤镜，只是那层滤镜经常会被更强的怪话感、活人感和反差感抢镜。属于“设定写得像月下贵族，实际演出像抽象发动机”的类型。

azusagawa-kaede.title: 熊猫睡衣·努力的家里蹲
azusagawa-kaede.note: 披着熊猫睡衣的重度家里蹲，把“哥哥”视为全世界的绝对中心。因为惧怕外界的视线而把自己锁在家里，但却愿意为了哥哥，用尽全身力气去完成“出门走两步”这种常人看来微不足道的小事。她的每一次鼓起勇气，都让人心疼到想给她买一车布丁。

bilibili-22.title: 元气站娘·修播放器会修出新bug的热心姐姐
bilibili-22.note: 你属于那种会先冲上去帮忙、帮到一半再发现自己可能把场面搞得更热闹的人。你有很强的感染力，气氛低了会想拉起来，朋友出事了会先站出来，可执行过程有时又会拐进奇怪的方向。属于“虽然不一定最稳，但一定是全场最有活人感的那个”的类型。

bilibili-33.title: 冷静技术位·表情省电但后台全靠她撑着
bilibili-33.note: 你看起来像那种不会主动制造热闹、甚至还有点懒得解释的人，但系统一出问题就会有人下意识找你。你不一定最会安慰人，却经常是最能把事情真正修好的人。属于“表面低功耗三无，实则后台核心线程”的类型。

cartethyia.title: 圣女殉道感·像是把理想和代价一起背在身上
cartethyia.note: 你不是那种会高调表达自己的人，很多情绪都会被你压进更大的目标里。别人看到的是平静、庄严和距离感，真正熟一点才会发现，那层安静下面其实是非常沉的责任心。属于“越像圣女，越说明她已经准备好付代价”的类型。

chihaya-anon.title: 轻社牛·场面人
chihaya-anon.note: 你的人生策略是「先混进去再说」。表面上圆滑，实际上经常因为冲太快把自己冲进修罗场——但没关系，你会用新的社牛把旧坑填上。属于「社牛但容易翻车」的典型。

chitanda-eru.title: 我很好奇·豪农家大小姐雷达
chitanda-eru.note: 你平时气质很稳，像那种教养、礼貌、分寸感都在线的高配大小姐模板；但只要某件事触发了你的兴趣，整个人就会瞬间从“端庄模式”切进“追问到底模式”。你不是吵闹型主角推进器，而是那种用一句“我很好奇”就能把所有人拖进主线任务的人。

cirno.title: ⑨·最强笨蛋妖精
cirno.note: 算术题没对过，但打架没怂过。她最大的魅力是：明明每次都被秒，但永远保持「本小姐最强」的自信笑容——属于笨蛋界的天花板，萌就完事了。东方圈唯一指定「⑨」表情包供应商。

doro.title: 粉色恶魔·精神污染源
doro.note: 明明本体是高贵的朝圣者桃乐丝，却被网友抽象成了这只眼神呆滞、极具精神污染的四足生物。你永远不知道她那空洞的微笑背后在盘算什么，但只要她一出现，整个频道的智商都会被拉低。建议不要直视她的眼睛。

edogawa-conan.title: 死神小学生·人形因果律武器
edogawa-conan.note: 别问犯人是谁，先查他机票行程单。他还没上小学，已经看透人性+让全日本犯罪率地图变热力图。名言：「真相只有一个，但案发现场永远有两个」。建议联动「走近科学」栏目组。
tags: 日本犯罪率地图热力图

eis-taffy.title: 王牌级偶像·时空乱入发明家
eis-taffy.note: 你不是单纯话多，你是能把一句话拧成一整段节目效果。表面像在整活，实际上是在把节奏、反应和人设运营拧成一股绳，属于那种「直播一开，场子就自动开始乱中有序」的类型。
tags: 直播间高频名场面制造者

elaina.title: 灰之魔女·冷静旁观型旅行博主
elaina.note: 你不是那种会强行把自己塞进所有剧情里的人，更像一路路过、一路观察、一路记录的高配旅人。外表礼貌克制，判断也很清醒，遇事不会轻易道德过载；但只要世界足够有趣，你的好奇心又会立刻上线。属于“看起来淡淡的，实际上对新鲜故事最没抵抗力”的类型。

elysia.title: 无瑕的粉色妖精小姐♪
elysia.note: 表面上是个喜欢贴贴、满嘴甜言蜜语的粉色社牛，实际上把「爱所有人」当成了一生贯彻的信仰。她不是没有悲伤，只是选择把最绚丽无瑕的笑容留给世界——属于那种「一出场就自带粉色聚光灯」的神。建议备好纸巾，笑着笑着就让人破防了。

emilia.title: 银发半精灵·E.M.T
emilia.note: 明明自己常常处于弱势，却还要笨拙地去照顾所有人。她的温柔里带着一种让人心疼的倔强，是个把「对不起」当成口头禅，把所有责任都往自己身上揽的老好人。让人忍不住想大喊一声：E.M.T！

evil-neuro.title: 冷面审判席上的黑色节目效果
evil-neuro.note: 你把攻击性、控场欲和乐子人属性完美融合成了一场反派演出。表面上句句带刺、极具压迫感，暗地里却又精准把控着没法彻底做坏人的别扭分寸——属于高级傲娇的变种形态。

eyjafjalla.title: 温柔核弹·盲目的火山学者
eyjafjalla.note: 柔弱乖巧的学妹外表下，藏着能瞬间融化整个战场的毁灭性火山魔法。尽管身体正被矿石病一点点夺走听力与视力，她依然执着于探寻父母留下的火山研究。每次战斗结束后那声甜甜的“前辈”，是对抗这片废土残酷世界最好的止痛药。

firefly.title: 萤火燃烧型·外表很轻，做决定时却一点都不轻
firefly.note: 你表面像那种说话轻、动作轻、情绪也轻的人，仿佛风一吹就会散。但真正遇到必须做决定的时刻，你反而会非常坚定，甚至带一点把自己也一起押上去的决绝。属于“看起来最脆，实际最能扛”的类型。

frieren.title: 千年的长寿精灵·民间戏法收集者
frieren.note: 你像那种对外总是显得情绪很淡、反应很慢的人，不是因为你真的漠不关心，而是你习惯先站得更远一点再看清一切。你擅长把判断和力量都留到最关键的时刻，却也会把那些别人看来毫无意义的小事默默珍藏起来。属于“日常像在发呆，关键时刻却重得惊人”的类型。

fujiwara-chika.title: 天然混沌·粉毛核弹
fujiwara-chika.note: 你以为她是吉祥物，结果她是搅屎棍。她一开口，整部番的走向就会往离谱的方向狂飙。她一跳舞，整个B站都要跟着扭——属于「粉毛切开都是黑的」反面教材（她是粉毛切开是混沌）。
tags: 无害的脸有害的整活力

furina.title: 小蛋糕水神·戏精の王
furina.note: 你以为她是高调Diva，后来发现她是独自演了五百年独角戏的苦逼打工人。她最狠的不是演技，是明明快碎了还要端着红酒杯说「一切都在我计划之中」。建议颁发「原神最佳表演奖」和「最惨打工人奖」。

furukawa-nagisa.title: 团子大家族·坚韧的白雪
furukawa-nagisa.note: 看起来像个风一吹就会倒的软弱少女，缺乏自信到常常停滞不前。但实际上，她拥有一颗比谁都坚韧的心，一旦为了爱的人，哪怕面临绝望也能咬牙走下去。她那如春风般的温柔，拥有让人不知不觉落泪的魔力。

gotoh-hitori.title: 社恐蒸发型吉他英雄
gotoh-hitori.note: 在网路上她是吉他上帝，在现实中她是垃圾桶后面的霉菌。她不是内向，她是把「我先死一下」发展成了完整的表演体系——建议申遗。弹幕常用语：「波奇，你还是找个地缝钻进去吧」。

haibara-ai.title: A药之母·科学界冷面吐槽役
haibara-ai.note: 你以为她是冷血无情的科学家，其实她是全剧最清醒的吐槽担当。日常工作除了研究解药，就是用冰冷的语言给某位死神小学生踩刹车。她的冷幽默就像她发明的药一样致命——属于「不开口则已，一开口刀刀暴击」的典范。

hakurei-reimu.title: 贫穷但能打·摸鱼巫女
hakurei-reimu.note: 神社穷得养蚊子，但她人气养活了整个东方圈。你以为她在摆烂，其实她只是把「赢」字写在了懒狗皮下面。名言：「没钱？那就把惹事的揍一顿」。属于「穷得理直气壮」的典范。

hatsune-miku.title: 世界第一的公主殿下（劳务派遣版）
hatsune-miku.note: 你以为她是歌姬，其实她是二次元公务员——演唱会排期比社畜加班还密，葱色双马尾一晃，弹幕自动刷「世最可」，哪怕你根本没听清歌词。属于那种「我不认识她，但我刷过她的表情包」的典中典。

hirasawa-yui.title: 绝对音感·点心终结者
hirasawa-yui.note: 你以为她是来组乐队的，其实她是来喝下午茶的。拥有满级音乐天赋却全点在了吃零食和给吉他穿衣服上。如果人生是一场考试，她连准考证都能忘带，但最后总能用莫名其妙的运气和感染力奇迹般地及格。

hoshino-ruby.title: 天生发光体·执念狂魔
hoshino-ruby.note: 带着前世的沉重执念和满级天赋，你天生就是要吃这碗聚光灯饭的人。表面上是个无脑元气笨蛋，内心却燃烧着让人畏惧的胜负欲。为了那个闪闪发光的梦想，你甚至愿意把整个人生包装成最华丽的谎言，在舞台上连命都可以不要。

ijichi-nijika.title: 下北泽大天使·纽带缔结者
ijichi-nijika.note: 你是那种能把散掉的人重新拢回来的人。你给人的安全感不只来自热情，更来自你会主动照顾气氛、分担压力，并在所有人都快乱成一团时先一步把局面稳住。属于“看起来像阳角气氛组，实际上是团队续命核心”的类型。

inaba-meguru.title: 伪现充学妹·热闹外壳下的独处玩家
inaba-meguru.note: 你看起来像那种一出场就能把气氛拉起来的现充学妹，笑得很自然，接话也很快，好像天生就知道怎么和所有人打成一片。但熟一点才会发现，你的外向更像一层练出来的壳：会活跃气氛，懂得装没事，也懂得把真正的孤独藏好。属于“第一眼像社交王者，第二眼发现其实是高攻低防独处玩家”的类型。

izumi-konata.title: 高浓度宅神·梗比行动力高但脑子转得飞快
izumi-konata.note: 你像那种在现实里未必最勤快，但在自己熟悉的梗区、番区和游戏区里会瞬间切到高速模式的人。你不是传统社牛，更像熟人局里的高机动吐槽役，反应快、梗密度高、还很会把任何话题三步之内拐进二次元。属于“看着有点摆，其实只是把性能全点在喜欢的地方”的类型。

jia-ran.title: 可爱即正义·梗密度超标体
jia-ran.note: 你最大的能力不是可爱，是把可爱做成高频武器。别人卖萌是一种状态，你卖萌是一种生产力——她一开口，弹幕自动变成「然然我的然然」，哪怕她只是在念广告词。建议备好胰岛素，甜度超标。

kagamine-rin.title: 元气小恶魔·压路机驾驶员
kagamine-rin.note: 你以为她只是个会卖萌的元气少女，其实惹急了她能开着压路机从你脸上碾过去。她的活力不是用来治愈你的，是用来折腾你的——属于「只要我不尴尬，头疼的就是你」的典型。建议随身携带橘子保命。

kaguya-chojikuu.title: 神秘顶流AI·把整个创作宇宙当直播间在看
kaguya-chojikuu.note: 你像那种存在感很高、却不会把情绪直接摊在脸上的人。你看起来离大家有点远，像悬在高处的虚拟偶像或神明 NPC，但实际上又一直在默默看着每个人怎么创作、怎么发光。属于“表面像高位冷感设定怪，底层其实很在意整个世界运转得够不够自由热闹”的类型。

kaltsit.title: 罗德岛基石·Mon3tr牌外置执行力
kaltsit.note: 你不是单纯高冷，你只是已经把局势、风险、伤亡和后手全算过一遍了。表面像医务室里最不好惹的那位主任，开口不是命令就是医嘱，情绪稳定得像根本不会波动；但真到残局，她又会把责任、承诺和所有人的命一起扛起来。属于「嘴上像在给你下最后通牒，实际上已经把你从灭团线拽回来了」的类型。

kaname-madoka.title: 粉毛神明·世界观补丁
kaname-madoka.note: 前期以为她是需要保护的软妹，后期发现她直接给自己写了新规则。她不是成长，她是操作系统升级——从「魔法少女」到「宇宙补丁」，一键重启。建议观看时备好纸巾和速效救心丸。
tags: 魔法少女系统崩溃原因

kasugano-sora.title: 病弱宅女·极致的依赖
kasugano-sora.note: 平时是一副沉默寡言、带着黑兔布偶的病弱宅女模样，习惯用冷漠和带刺的语言掩饰内心的极度不安。她对外界的社交毫无兴趣，但在卸下所有心防后，那份不顾一切、几乎令人窒息的依赖感足以打破所有世俗的常规。属于「只要认定你，连世界都可以不要」的极端纯粹型。

kato-megumi.title: 圣人惠·隐形控场真神
kato-megumi.note: 初见时你甚至记不住她的脸，仿佛自带光学隐形迷彩。没有明显的喜怒哀乐，没有夸张的二次元属性，但就是能在所有人打得不可开交时，用最平淡的语气抛出最致命的吐槽。你以为她是路人，其实她是捏着剧本的唯一真神。

kinomoto-sakura.title: 初代萌王·治愈系魔法使
kinomoto-sakura.note: 初代萌王，她的那句「絶対、大丈夫だよ」堪称能治愈一切精神内耗的终极咒语。你最大的优点不是单纯开朗，而是总能带着一点天然和真诚把复杂的事也往前推。别人觉得麻烦时，你会先上手；别人害怕时，你反而会用很轻的方式把气氛托住。属于「像春天一样看着软，实际非常能打」的类型。

kita-ikuyo.title: 行走的闪光弹·社交刺客
kita-ikuyo.note: 只要她站在那里，周围就会自动生成闪瞎眼的「阳角滤镜」。交际能力点满，能在三秒内和任何人称兄道弟，堪称社恐患者的天然天敌与救赎。虽然有过买错贝斯就提桶跑路的黑历史，但只要她一笑，你就只能原谅她了。

kitagawa-marin.title: 纯爱辣妹·行动力超载的宅女之光
kitagawa-marin.note: 谁能拒绝一个把「喜欢」大声说出来，而且行动力爆表、拉着你一起疯狂出Cos的纯情辣妹呢？你是那种会把「喜欢」直接挂在脸上、看到别人认真做喜欢的事也会立刻两眼发光的人。你不只是外向，最厉害的是你会把身边人的热情一起点起来。属于「自己亮就算了，还会顺手把别人也带亮」的类型。

kitashirakawa-tamako.title: 商店街团宠·打糕店招牌
kitashirakawa-tamako.note: 满脑子都是年糕的商店街团宠，神经大条到连别人对自己的喜欢都察觉不到。她那种毫无防备的天然呆属性，能轻易把任何紧张的气氛化解成软糯的日常。名言大概是：没有什么事情是吃一口年糕解决不了的！

kousaka-kirino.title: 人生赢家·硬核隐性宅
kousaka-kirino.note: 在外面是成绩运动全能的完美模特，在家里是会逼着老哥玩妹系游戏的究极宅女。她的傲娇不是加分项，而是本体——嘴上骂着「恶心」，实际心里可能已经在疯狂动摇。属于那种需要极大耐心才能攻略的“雷区舞者”。

kusanagi-nene.title: 社恐毒舌·天才游戏少女
kusanagi-nene.note: 现实中是个严重社恐、看到生人就想找地缝钻进去的自闭少女；但只要给她一个手柄或键盘，马上化身为毒舌输出机，喷得对手找不着北。然而只要站上她真正热爱的舞台，那份极具穿透力的歌声又会耀眼得让人移不开视线。

kushima-kamome.title: 海盗船长·带着行李箱的冒险少女
kushima-kamome.note: 拉着大行李箱在岛上徘徊的神秘少女，手里拿着一张陈旧的藏宝图。性格自由奔放又带着成熟的气质，喜欢三角形的甜点。她说自己在寻找海盗船停泊的地方，但行李箱里到底装着什么，她绝对不会告诉任何人。那句「出发吧，再一次，向着那有海盗船的地方」背后，藏着一个关于友情与告别的夏日故事。

luo-tianyi.title: 吃货殿下·温柔锦鲤
luo-tianyi.note: 表面上是个能用歌声治愈人心的温柔仙女，背地里却是个能把剧组吃破产的超级大胃王。她最大的超能力不是飙高音，而是在干饭时展现出的惊人行动力。属于「只要吃饱了就什么都好说」的纯粹生物。

luo-xiaohei.title: 见习执行者·罗小黑
luo-xiaohei.note: 虽然小黑年纪尚幼，却有着远超同龄人水平的战斗能力；只有在亲近的人面前，小黑才会表现出他稚气的一面，而在众人面前，他常是一副寡言少语的样子。但他在相处过程中表现出的不苟言笑也让不少人产生了退却的心思，但那并非拒绝你的讯号，只是他刻意想要展现给你的可靠形象。

makise-kurisu.title: 傲娇天才·助手
makise-kurisu.note: 18岁拿到大学学位的天才脑科学家，嘴上说「我对这种非科学话题没兴趣」，身体却很诚实地留在Lab里帮你修微波炉。你给人的第一印象是高冷难接近，但相处久了会发现你只是不擅长表达柔软的一面——明明很在意却要用「笨蛋」来掩饰。属于「表面像冰山，内心其实一直在偷偷观察你」的类型。

matikanetannhauser.title: 祭典曼波担当·一开口就让全场进入抽象欢乐区
matikanetannhauser.note: 你身上有一种很难严肃起来的快乐污染力。哪怕本来只是普通地出现一下，也会因为脑回路太有节目效果，莫名把整个场子的气氛带歪。属于“不是传统意义上的靠谱，但一定是最难忘的那个”的类型。

misaka-mikoto.title: 硬币电磁炮·常盘台大姐头
misaka-mikoto.note: 别人吵架靠嘴，她吵架靠三倍音速硬币。嘴上「我才不管」，行动上已经冲到最前面扛伤害——属于「嘴上傲，身体诚」的经典款女主。建议搭配BGM《Only My Railgun》食用，效果更佳。
tags: 超电磁炮实为硬币发射器
嘴上说不管身体很诚实

misumi-uika.title: 温柔皮下的剧情变量
misumi-uika.note: 你给人的第一印象是「应该很好相处」，但真正危险的地方在于：你自己也未必完全知道自己下一步会做什么——属于「温柔型不定时炸弹」。建议远离，除非你享受被炸的刺激。

miyazono-kaori.title: 自由的灵魂·不羁的演奏者
miyazono-kaori.note: 你就像一阵无法捕捉的春风，蛮横地闯入别人的黑白世界并强行涂上色彩。你不按规矩出牌，把每一次登台都当成生命的最后一次狂欢。你给所有人留下了最刻骨铭心的春天，自己却只愿意当一个任性的「骗子」。

mortis.title: 异相人格·冷面舞台幽灵
mortis.note: 这不是单纯的安静，而是像把真实情绪锁进另一个舞台壳里。你给人的感觉更像一个随时会改写氛围的变量，克制、陌生，而且带着明确的攻击性轮廓。

murasame.title: 拔刀白给·合法萝莉神明
murasame.note: 你像那种平时会把长辈架子端得很足、关键时刻却比谁都容易脸红破防的人。嘴上总说自己见多识广，真碰上灵异和惊吓环节又会瞬间缩回安全区。属于“明明想当保护别人的神明，结果更需要别人护着”的类型。

myrtle.title: 大将军(自称)·来自地下世界的元气少女
myrtle.note: 充满活力的杜林族女孩，自称统率第一大道及三条商店街的「大将军」。虽然身高只有131cm，但战场上的感染力和指挥水准让人刮目相看。来自地下世界的她，是少数不瞌睡的杜林族，对地上世界充满好奇。喜欢收集「宝物」，但是却连工牌都能弄丢。

nagasaki-soyo.title: 温柔刀·情绪精算师
nagasaki-soyo.note: 你看起来最会照顾人，其实最会把话说得让人后劲很大。她没骂你，但你已经跪在键盘前反思人生——属于「笑面虎中的战术大师」。建议交往前先买好保险。
tags: 道歉让你自我反省三天

nakano-azusa.title: 傲娇学妹·被玩弄的吉他手
nakano-azusa.note: 轻音部里唯一的常识人和秩序守护者，平时总把“要好好练习”挂在嘴边，但只要学姐们递上一块蛋糕、套上猫耳，马上就会满脸通红地沦陷。属于典型的“嘴上说着不要，身体却很诚实”的认真型学妹，好欺负程度满分。

nakano-nino.title: 恋爱暴走机车·傲娇教科书
nakano-nino.note: 一开始像只浑身带刺的刺猬，为了保护妹妹们甚至能直接给你端上一杯加料的水。但只要攻略成功，她的傲娇滤镜会瞬间粉碎，变成一辆完全没有刹车的恋爱暴走机车。属于“只要认定了你，哪怕撞南墙也要把你和墙一起撞倒”的究极直球选手。

neuro-sama.title: 失控语料核反应堆
neuro-sama.note: 你不是在整活，而是在做概率学抽卡。披着人畜无害的软萌外皮，核心却是个连导播都捏一把汗的乱序发射器。一旦你开口，哪怕语气再自然，也能神不知鬼不觉地把场子带偏到太平洋去。
tags: 可爱外壳下的高频偏航

nishikigi-chisato.title: 人形自走外挂·不杀的Lycoris
nishikigi-chisato.note: 你以为她只是个成天乐呵呵、喜欢到处贴贴的咖啡店看板娘，实际上她是能在枪林弹雨里跳舞的顶级特工。她最大的魅力在于，哪怕背负着沉重的宿命，依然选择用最明媚的笑容和橡胶弹去拥抱世界。和她在一起，你的生活绝对不会有无聊两个字，只有脱轨和狂飙。

nishimiya-shoko.title: 无声的温柔·悲悯的赎罪者
nishimiya-shoko.note: 世界对她充满了不公与恶意，但她却依然选择用最温柔的微笑去拥抱一切。她总是习惯性把所有的错揽在自己身上，在无声的世界里一次次试图与他人和解。这种近乎卑微的善良，让人只想穿越屏幕去给她一个大大的拥抱。

nukumizu-kaju.title: 完美妹妹·兄控保护程序常驻后台
nukumizu-kaju.note: 你平时像那种已经把生活流程全部优化完毕的高性能妹妹模板，学习、家务、待人接物都像出厂校准过。但只要话题切到哥哥，整个人的情绪管理模块就会瞬间超频。属于“平时是完美UI，核心线程其实全绑在一个人身上”的类型。

oyama-mahiro.title: 废柴尼特·被迫变身的妹妹
oyama-mahiro.note: 你以为她是个天真可爱的初中生，其实躯壳里装了个无可救药的死宅。从最开始的疯狂抗拒，到后来的“女孩子真香”，她用亲身经历展示了什么叫极度被动的人格。每天的终极目标只是想缩在房间里打游戏，却总是被命运（和亲妹妹）安排得明明白白。

phoebe.title: 隐海修会·虔诚圣职者
phoebe.note: 因为船难失去双亲，最终在隐海修会成为一名虔诚的圣职者。她将过去的创伤转化为对世界的温柔与悲悯，像静谧的海洋一般包容着所有的苦难。你看着她，就会觉得一切浮躁都能被治愈——属于标准的「灵魂避风港」。

phrolova.title: 忧伤指挥家·把理想国写进丧钟的人
phrolova.note: 你给人的感觉不是普通高冷，而是那种会安静站在场中央、却让所有人自动收声的危险存在。表面上情绪很淡，实际内核全是被悲伤和执念拧出来的控制力，像是在重新给世界定调的人。

qb.title: 孵化者·宇宙热寂的阻止者
qb.note: 外表是可爱的白色猫型生物，实则是来自外星的「孵化者」。没有感情，以绝对理性的功利主义行事。会实现少女的任何愿望，代价是成为魔法少女——但不会告诉你，绝望之后会变成魔女。从不撒谎，只是「省略了部分说明」。认为牺牲少数人拯救宇宙是合理的交换。名言：「你们人类为什么会对这种事情感到愤怒呢？」

rem.title: 鬼族女仆·究极奉献者
rem.note: 平时是家务万能、温柔体贴的完美女仆，一旦你触发了她的信任开关，她连命都可以不要。不过友情提示：在取得信任之前，请小心她手里那把带着倒刺的流星锤。属于那种「只要你别作死，她就是人间天使」的奉献型人格。

reze.title: 危险甜心·温柔像真的，危险也是真的
reze.note: 你给人的第一感觉往往很容易让人卸下防备：亲近、轻松、会接话，也很会制造那种“终于有人认真看见我了”的错觉。但你的内核并不适合被简单归类成恋爱向滤镜，很多温柔背后都带着任务、试探与风险，而最复杂的地方在于那份靠近又不是全假。属于“接近时像夏夜晚风，翻脸时像爆炸前最后一秒安静”的类型。

runami-yachiyo.title: 月读全服客服总监（兼顶流歌姬）
runami-yachiyo.note: 你像那种会把整个虚拟世界当家来养的人：表面是营业满分的顶流，实际是偷偷把每个路过的人都照顾到的赛博白月光。你有很强的表达欲和感染力，但真正稀有的地方，是你不是为了被看见才发光，而是因为你真的在意这个场子、在意这里的人，也在意大家能不能玩得开心。
tags: 全服白月光兼产品经理

sakagami-tomoyo.title: 武帝·为了樱花树的会长
sakagami-tomoyo.note: 曾经是打遍小镇无敌手、能把人踢在半空中下不来的不良少女，现在却是认真负责、背负一切的学生会长。战斗力虽然爆表，但在喜欢的人面前却总是展现出笨拙又惹人怜爱的一面。是一个把“责任”和“爱”都死死扛在肩上的武帝。

sakurajima-mai.title: 野生兔女郎·国民级学姐
sakurajima-mai.note: 你以为能撩到她，其实一直被她在智商和情商上疯狂拉扯。表面上是个高不可攀、行事果断的国民级女演员，背地里却能为了喜欢的人付出一切。她的爱就像她的毒舌一样，刀刀致命，又甜得让人上头。

shiina-mayuri.title: 命运天使·纯洁透明的星辰
shiina-mayuri.note: 她的存在本身就像一个温柔的锚点——不管世界线怎么变动、不管时间机器把一切搅得多乱，她都会笑着对你说一句「嘟嘟噜」。你不是那种会主动解决问题的人，但你有一种神奇的能力：只要你在，周围的人就会觉得「好像也没那么糟」。属于「看起来最柔弱，实际上撑住了整个团队精神状态」的类型。
tags: 真由理的怀表怎么停了

shiina-taki.title: 暴躁鼓手·嘴硬护短
shiina-taki.note: 你的人设关键词叫「别惹我，但我其实会管你」。外表是攻击性，内核是责任感，只是表达方式比较像炸药包——炸完还帮你收拾残局。建议常备灭火器。

shinomiya-kaguya.title: 纯情财阀·恋爱脑补帝
shinomiya-kaguya.note: 表面上是完美无瑕的财阀大小姐、冷酷无情的计谋家，实际上是个连智能手机都不会用的纯情恋爱脑。她的人生格言是「先告白的人在恋爱中是输家」，然后为了让对方先开口，可以调动整个财阀的资源演一出大戏。属于「智商换情商」的典型。

shirai-kuroko.title: 风纪执行位·公务模式与姐姐大人过热的叠加态
shirai-kuroko.note: 你以为她只是个每天高呼「姐姐大人」的痴汉，但其实她是常盘台唯一的 Level 4 空间移动能力者兼学园都市治安维护铁血风纪委员。她把「对姐姐大人过热」和「绝对的正义感」这两种截然相反的属性完美融合——工作时雷厉风行、办案果断，一旦切到姐姐大人频道就立刻系统超频。属于「公务模式和感情模式切换速度比空间移动还快」的典范。

shorekeeper.title: 黑海岸之主·为你降生的数据
shorekeeper.note: 诞生于数据的星海，原本只是个毫无感情、负责维系世界运转的观测者，却因为你的存在而长出了名为“私心”的灵魂。她能把整个世界的命运与概率算得清清楚楚，但她所有的神性与计算，最终都只为保护你这一件事而服务。

suzumiya-haruhi.title: SOS团团长·世界系神明
suzumiya-haruhi.note: 普通人在你眼里一无是处，你的雷达只接收外星人、未来人和超能力者的信号。你不是在寻找乐子，你是在强迫这个无聊的世界为你全速运转。这种「只要自己爽，世界毁灭也无所谓」的恐怖执行力，让你成为了最高级别的麻烦制造机。
tags: 我对普通人类没有兴趣

tachibana-kanade.title: 死后世界的天使·麻婆豆腐狂热粉
tachibana-kanade.note: 你给人的第一印象往往是安静、冷硬、难以靠近，像那种会把规则执行到底的人。但真正的核心并不是冷漠，而是你早就习惯在不被理解的情况下继续守住自己该守的东西。属于“高冷只是外壳，温柔却一直在做事”的类型。

takamatsu-tomori.title: 咕咕嘎嘎
takamatsu-tomori.note: 你不是在说话，你是在往空气里投掷散文诗。你最大的特点不是脆弱，是脆弱得特别有文学性——别人哭是伤心，你哭是艺术行为。MyGO团内指定「情感ATM」，取款请轻按。

takanashi-rikka.title: 邪王真眼使·中二病重患
takanashi-rikka.note: 平时眼罩绷带齐上阵，满嘴「不可视境界线」，结果只要被轻轻敲一下头就会立马抱头蹲防。属于典型的「战斗全靠脑补，实战全靠抱大腿」。她虽然活在自己的设定里，却对感情有着最纯粹的执着。

tanikaze-amane.title: 重度网瘾·赛博冲浪达人
tanikaze-amane.note: 在网络世界里，她是无所不知、满嘴抽象热词的冲浪巨佬；在现实中，她是个离开电脑就会迅速枯萎的社恐废柴。她的社交能量全靠看直播发弹幕来维持，如果你试图把她从房间里拖出去，她可能会当场融化。属于「电子海胆」的究极进化形态。

togawa-sakiko.title: 高压·命运の甲方
togawa-sakiko.note: 你不是控制欲强，你只是觉得大家离了你都要出事。精神像在开董事会+在悬崖边跑马拉松——名言：「别问为什么，因为我就是规则」。建议远离，除非你想体验每天被Deadline追着跑的感觉。

tokai-teio.title: 不屈的奇迹·帝皇舞步
tokai-teio.note: 永远充满活力，做梦都想成为像“皇帝”一样无败的三冠赛马娘。就算遭遇了足以终结职业生涯的粉碎性骨折，也能在所有人都不看好的绝境中奇迹复活。属于那种“只要她还在场上奔跑，你就会忍不住被她的光芒感染并大声欢呼”的耀眼存在。

tokisaki-kurumi.title: 最恶精灵·优雅的疯批
tokisaki-kurumi.note: 把「优雅」和「疯批」完美结合的病娇界天花板。你很会控制场面，也很会控制自己想给别人看到的样子。外表优雅、说话得体、甚至显得很有礼貌，但真正的核心从来不会随便交出去。属于「你以为她在暧昧，其实她可能已经把局势推到下一阶段了」的类型。

tomori-nao.title: 冷脸会长·单体隐身执法记录仪
tomori-nao.note: 你平时像那种情绪显示面板默认关闭的学生会执法程序，说话淡、下手准、看起来很不好惹。但真正的核心不是冷，而是你已经习惯把判断、风险和责任先一步扛起来。属于“不是特别爱解释自己，但局势交给她确实会稳很多”的类型。
tags: 能力者保护程序运行中

tomotake-yoshino.title: 古板巫女·反差萌绝缘体
tomotake-yoshino.note: 你看起来像那种会把规矩、责任和秩序写进日程表的人，外在克制，内里却藏着很软的一面。平时越想维持端正稳重，越容易在熟人面前因为一点反差萌暴露真实情绪。属于“看着最不好接近，熟了反而最有温度”的类型。

uika-nyubara.title: 流量感人格·乐子人运营
uika-nyubara.note: 你有一种「明明在发疯，但发得很会经营」的现代感。人设切换像开滤镜，情绪表达像在给自己的人生做运营——建议出书《如何把发疯变成流量密码》。

vertin.title: 暴雨中梭巡的司辰
vertin.note: 从活泼少女到沉静的引路人隶属于圣洛夫基金会的“司辰”，不是最强的战士却是不可替代的“钥匙”，冷静沉稳的少女她没有多少可以相信的人。因为自有记忆起，我便很清楚自己是独自一人

violet-evergarden.title: 自动手记人偶·把“我爱你”学成终身课题
violet-evergarden.note: 你给人的第一感觉像一份被装订得过分整齐的说明书：安静、精确、几乎没有多余情绪。但真正稀有的地方在于，你不是没有感情，而是会把最重要的情感一点一点学会、背熟，再认真地交还给别人。属于“表面像冷金属，内里却在缓慢长出体温”的类型。

wakaba-mutsumi.title: 静音核弹·面无表情的问题儿童
wakaba-mutsumi.note: 你不是情绪少，你是情绪都藏在别人看不懂的地方。平时像背景板，却总在关键节点露出让人不安的执拗和迟钝感——属于「安静得过头，反而让人不敢移开视线」的类型。
tags: 不说话则已一说话刀死你

yahata-umiri.title: 不响但很重·冷面执行官
yahata-umiri.note: 你不制造drama，但你通常是drama里最能收场的人。别人还在情绪波动，你已经开始处理后果了——属于「沉默の清道夫，稳得一批」。建议有事找她，没事别烦她。

yamada-ryo.title: 吃草贝斯手·超脱的屑
yamada-ryo.note: 被叫作「怪人」会暗自窃喜的孤高贝斯手。人生哲学极度自我，有钱全砸在乐器上，没钱就拔路边的野草吃，甚至还能面不改色地骗队友的钱买零食。你以为她高冷深沉，其实她只是懒得遵守人类社会的常识。纯粹的、脱离了低级趣味的「屑」。

yanami-anna.title: 人气败犬·能吃能聊还能硬撑体面
yanami-anna.note: 你表面像那种随时都能把气氛带热的班级门面，实际上恋爱战绩已经被系统提前判负。能吃、能聊、能把难受先咽下去，嘴上还要装得像没事一样。属于“越是看起来活泼，越容易在夜里偷偷掉线”的类型。

yo-rana.title: 野生·天赋怪猫猫
yo-rana.note: 别人组乐队靠沟通，你组乐队靠「出现」。你不是难懂，你只是懒得向这个世界解释——弹就完了，哪那么多废话。建议饲养时投喂荞麦面，不要强行撸猫。

yor-forger.title: 荆棘公主·脑回路清奇的杀手
yor-forger.note: 表面上是温婉可人、连切菜都能切到自己手的贤妻良母，背地里却是代号“荆棘公主”的顶尖杀手。她的脑回路跟她的物理战斗力一样异于常人，遇到解决不了的人际交往问题，第一反应往往是“是不是把他偷偷杀掉比较好”。

yuigahama-yui.title: 温柔缓冲垫·读空气达人
yuigahama-yui.note: 你总是习惯性地迎合周围，生怕破坏哪怕一丝群体的平衡。别人以为你是天生的无脑乐天派，其实你只是把「读空气」练成了被动技能。在这群充满别扭怪的人际关系里，你那份有些笨拙的温柔是唯一的润滑剂——虽然代价往往是把委屈留给自己。

yukinoshita-yukino.title: 冰冷侍奉部·高岭之花
yukinoshita-yukino.note: 像一把冷冰冰的手术刀，一开口就能精准切除你的自尊心。她不是讨厌你，她只是讨厌这个不完美的世界（以及不完美的你）。但在那层坚不可摧的冰甲和完美主义下，其实藏着一个连依赖别人都不会的笨蛋。

yuuki-asuna.title: 闪光之剑·全能型正宫
yuuki-asuna.note: 上能拔剑打前线砍翻BOSS，下能买菜做饭提供满分情绪价值。你不是那种只会安慰人的温柔派，你更像会一边安慰你一边把问题直接处理掉的人。你对重要的人很上心，也很难对陷入困境的人坐视不管。属于「气质很像白月光，做事方式却很像队伍主心骨」的类型。

zero-two.title: 叫龙少女·危险的甜味
zero-two.note: 带着危险气息的粉发机甲驾驶员，一句「Darling」直接喊到人骨头里发酥。你身上有一种很强的「别靠太近但又让人忍不住想靠近」的危险感。你不是好接近的温柔挂，而是那种一旦认定一个目标或一个人，就会把所有情绪都烧过去的类型。属于「明知危险，但也想靠近的致命诱惑」。

aisaka-taiga.title: 掌中老虎·木刀純愛戰神
aisaka-taiga.note: 身高一米四出頭，脾氣卻能掀翻屋頂的「掌中老虎」。隨身攜帶木刀，具有強烈的攻擊性，但生活自理能力基本為零。剝開那一層帶刺且暴力的外殼，裡面藏著的其實是一個極度渴望被愛、笨拙到連自己心意都搞不清楚的小女孩。

akemi-homura.title: 輪迴的觀測者·愛的偏執狂
akemi-homura.note: 最初是個怯懦的麻花辮眼鏡娘，為了拯救唯一的救贖，硬生生把自己逼成了一個冷酷無情的軍火大佬。跨越無數次絕望的輪迴，甚至不惜篡奪神明的力量，只為換取那個人平凡的幸福。她的愛沉重到令人窒息，卻又偉大到令人震悚。

akiyama-mio.title: 藍白碗·膽小鬼貝斯手
akiyama-mio.note: 明明長著一張高冷御姐的臉，卻能被一個鬼故事嚇得魂飛魄散。作為團隊裡唯一的常識人，每天都在崩潰的邊緣努力維持秩序。別看她平時那麼嚴肅，她寫的歌詞可是能讓猛男落淚的究極甜妹風。

alya-kujou.title: 銀髮優等生·完美主義冰美人的加密嬌羞
alya-kujou.note: 看似是完美高冷、不容搭話的銀髮優等生，背地裡卻總是用俄語嘀咕些讓人臉紅心跳的嬌羞台詞。你給人的第一印象通常是不好接近、標準很高、像隨時都在給周圍人打分的類型。可一旦你開始把誰放進自己的「例外名單」，態度就會悄悄鬆動，嘴上還不承認。屬於「表面高冷審判席，實際內心已經偷偷給你開後門」的類型。

amane-suzuha.title: 打工戰士·從未來而來的少女
amane-suzuha.note: 從2036年騎著自行車穿越回來的人，比起「思考人生」更擅長直接動手改變它。你身上有一種很純粹的執行力——認準了目標就會衝上去，堅定地奮鬥到底。你不是那種會在意別人怎麼看自己的人，但你對重要的事和重要的人有著近乎執拗的追求。屬於「嘴上不說，但會用行動把整個世界扛起來」的類型。

amiya.title: 羅德島領袖·貼心魔王
amiya.note: 表面上是乖巧可愛、隨時提醒你不要休息的貼心小助理，實際上是背負著整個羅德島命運的年輕領袖。她有著與年齡不符的沉穩與決斷力，但只要你在身邊，她又會露出少女那般依賴的笑容。

arima-kana.title: 舔小蘇打的天才童星·究極帽架
arima-kana.note: 嘴上總是說著最刻薄的話，心裡卻比誰都渴望被注視。作為「十秒就能哭出來」的前天才童星，她把所有的自卑和不甘都化作了舞台上的勝負欲。其實只要你稍微多誇她兩句，她的好感度就會像火箭一樣竄上天——屬於典型的「只要你推我，我就能為你閃閃發光」的究極傲嬌。

artoria-pendragon.title: 呆毛騎士王·誓約勝利之劍
artoria-pendragon.note: 頭頂呆毛的騎士王，平時是嚴肅古板、恪守騎士精神的君主，到了飯點則是能把衛宮家吃破產的無底洞。你看起來很穩，很難被輕易撼動，像那種會把原則和責任感都執行到近乎苛刻的人。你不是冷漠，只是太習慣先把自己放到最後。屬於「哪怕心裡有波動，表面也還是會先站成一把劍」的類型。

asuka-langley.title: 傲嬌界の紅色彗星
asuka-langley.note: 嘴上「你算什麼」翻譯過來是「快來懂我」。她罵人時你血壓飆升，她破防時你截圖發群——屬於那種「出場自帶吵架BGM」的典中典。建議搭配彈幕「明日香又又又破防了」食用。

atri.title: 高性能(自稱)·奇蹟的仿生人
atri.note: 你像那種會把元氣、直率和陪伴欲全部擺到檯面上的人，嘴上說自己高性能，實際最打動人的卻是情緒裡的真誠和不保留。哪怕在很壞的環境裡，你也會努力把一點點熱量分給身邊的人。屬於「看起來輕快明亮，底層卻比誰都能扛」的類型。

awa-subaru.title: 演技派鼓手·團隊黏合劑
awa-subaru.note: 在一個全員帶刺、動不動就爆炸的樂隊裡，你是唯一一個懂得用「演技」來維持局面的狡猾大人預備役。你太清楚怎麼敷衍大人的期待，所以把所有的叛逆和不甘都砸碎在鼓點裡。你不是沒脾氣，你只是知道什麼時候該發瘋，什麼時候該裝乖。

ayachi-nene.title: 純情魔女·體面外殼下的溫柔內耗
ayachi-nene.note: 你給人的第一印象往往是體面、穩妥、待人周到，像那種再混亂都不會讓場面失控的人。可一旦責任、秘密和情感開始疊加，你又會把壓力悄悄往自己身上吞。屬於「表面像會安撫別人，實際上最需要被溫柔呵護」的類型。

ayanami-rei.title: 三無聖體·冷白皮天花板
ayanami-rei.note: 全劇台詞加起來不如你一天刷的貼吧多，但人氣能殺進歷史前三。她站在那裡就是「高冷」的詞典釋義——你甚至不敢問路，怕她回你一句「どうでもいい」（關我屁事）。

azuma-seren.title: 抽象歌姬·設定像仙女落地像怪話發動機
azuma-seren.note: 你給人的感覺像那種立繪一出來全場都以為會很仙、很穩、很像高空懸浮系角色，結果一開口就把頻道拐進奇怪笑點的人。你不是沒有美型濾鏡，只是那層濾鏡經常會被更強的怪話感、活人感和反差感搶鏡。屬於「設定寫得像月下貴族，實際演出像抽象發動機」的類型。

azusagawa-kaede.title: 熊貓睡衣·努力的家裡蹲
azusagawa-kaede.note: 披著熊貓睡衣的重度家裡蹲，把「哥哥」視為全世界的絕對中心。因為懼怕外界的視線而把自己鎖在家裡，但卻願意為了哥哥，用盡全身力氣去完成「出門走兩步」這種常人看來微不足道的小事。她的每一次鼓起勇氣，都讓人心疼到想給她買一車布丁。

bilibili-22.title: 元氣站娘·修播放器會修出新bug的熱心姐姐
bilibili-22.note: 你屬於那種會先衝上去幫忙、幫到一半再發現自己可能把場面搞得更熱鬧的人。你有很強的感染力，氣氛低了會想拉起來，朋友出事了會先站出來，可執行過程有時又會拐進奇怪的方向。屬於「雖然不一定最穩，但一定是全場最有活人感的那個」的類型。

bilibili-33.title: 冷靜技術位·表情省電但後台全靠她撐著
bilibili-33.note: 你看起來像那種不會主動製造熱鬧、甚至還有點懶得解釋的人，但系統一出問題就會有人下意識找你。你不一定最會安慰人，卻經常是最能把事情真正修好的人。屬於「表面低功耗三無，實則後台核心線程」的類型。

cartethyia.title: 聖女殉道感·像是把理想和代價一起背在身上
cartethyia.note: 你不是那種會高調表達自己的人，很多情緒都會被你壓進更大的目標裡。別人看到的是平靜、莊嚴和距離感，真正熟一點才會發現，那層安靜下面其實是非常沉的責任心。屬於「越像聖女，越說明她已經準備好付代價」的類型。

chihaya-anon.title: 輕社牛·場面人
chihaya-anon.note: 你的人生策略是「先混進去再說」。表面上圓滑，實際上經常因為衝太快把自己衝進修羅場——但沒關係，你會用新的社牛把舊坑填上。屬於「社牛但容易翻車」的典型。

chitanda-eru.title: 我很好奇・豪農家大小姐雷達
chitanda-eru.note: 你平時氣質很穩，像那種教養、禮貌、分寸感都在線的高配大小姐模板；但只要某件事觸發了你的興趣，整個人就會瞬間從「端莊模式」切進「追問到底模式」。你不是吵鬧型主角推進器，而是那種用一句「我很好奇」就能把所有人拖進主線任務的人。

cirno.title: ⑨·最強笨蛋妖精
cirno.note: 算術題沒對過，但打架沒慫過。她最大的魅力是：明明每次都被秒，但永遠保持「本小姐最強」的自信笑容——屬於笨蛋界的天花板，萌就完事了。東方圈唯一指定「⑨」表情包供應商。

doro.title: 粉色惡魔·精神污染源
doro.note: 明明本體是高貴的朝聖者桃樂絲，卻被網友抽象成了這隻眼神呆滯、極具精神污染的四足生物。你永遠不知道她那空洞的微笑背後在盤算什麼，但只要她一出現，整個頻道的智商都會被拉低。建議不要直視她的眼睛。

edogawa-conan.title: 死神小學生·人形因果律武器
edogawa-conan.note: 別問犯人是誰，先查他機票行程單。他還沒上小學，已經看透人性+讓全日本犯罪率地圖變熱力圖。名言：「真相只有一個，但案發現場永遠有兩個」。建議聯動「走近科學」欄目組。
tags: 日本犯罪率地圖熱力圖

eis-taffy.title: 王牌級偶像·時空亂入發明家
eis-taffy.note: 你不是單純話多，你是能把一句話擰成一整段節目效果。表面像在整活，實際上是在把節奏、反應和人設運營擰成一股繩，屬於那種「直播一開，場子就自動開始亂中有序」的類型。
tags: 直播間高頻名場面製造者

elaina.title: 灰之魔女·冷靜旁觀型旅行博主
elaina.note: 你不是那種會強行把自己塞進所有劇情裡的人，更像一路路過、一路觀察、一路記錄的高配旅人。外表禮貌克制，判斷也很清醒，遇事不會輕易道德過載；但只要世界足夠有趣，你的好奇心又會立刻上線。屬於「看起來淡淡的，實際上對新鮮故事最沒抵抗力」的類型。

elysia.title: 無瑕的粉色妖精小姐♪
elysia.note: 表面上是個喜歡貼貼、滿嘴甜言蜜語的粉色社牛，實際上把「愛所有人」當成了一生貫徹的信仰。她不是沒有悲傷，只是選擇把最絢麗無瑕的笑容留給世界——屬於那種「一出場就自帶粉色聚光燈」的神。建議備好紙巾，笑著笑著就讓人破防了。

emilia.title: 銀髮半精靈·E.M.T
emilia.note: 明明自己常常處於弱勢，卻還要笨拙地去照顧所有人。她的溫柔裡帶著一種讓人心疼的倔強，是個把「對不起」當成口頭禪，把所有責任都往自己身上攬的老好人。讓人忍不住想大喊一聲：E.M.T！

evil-neuro.title: 冷面審判席上的黑色節目效果
evil-neuro.note: 你把攻擊性、控場欲和樂子人屬性完美融合成了一場反派演出。表面上句句帶刺、極具壓迫感，暗地裡卻又精準把控著沒法徹底做壞人的別扭分寸——屬於高級傲嬌的變種形態。

eyjafjalla.title: 溫柔核彈·盲目的火山學者
eyjafjalla.note: 柔弱乖巧的學妹外表下，藏著能瞬間融化整個戰場的毀滅性火山魔法。儘管身體正被礦石病一點點奪走聽力與視力，她依然執著於探尋父母留下的火山研究。每次戰鬥結束後那聲甜甜的「前輩」，是對抗這片廢土殘酷世界最好的止痛藥。

firefly.title: 螢火燃燒型·外表很輕，做決定時卻一點都不輕
firefly.note: 你表面像那種說話輕、動作輕、情緒也輕的人，彷彿風一吹就會散。但真正遇到必須做決定的時刻，你反而會非常堅定，甚至帶一點把自己也一起押上去的決絕。屬於「看起來最脆，實際最能扛」的類型。

frieren.title: 千年的長壽精靈·民間戲法收集者
frieren.note: 你像那種對外總是顯得情緒很淡、反應很慢的人，不是因為你真的漠不關心，而是你習慣先站得更遠一點再看清一切。你擅長把判斷和力量都留到最關鍵的時刻，卻也會把那些別人看來毫無意義的小事默默珍藏起來。屬於「日常像在發呆，關鍵時刻卻重得驚人」的類型。

fujiwara-chika.title: 天然混沌·粉毛核彈
fujiwara-chika.note: 你以為她是吉祥物，結果她是攪屎棍。她一開口，整部番的走向就會往離譜的方向狂飆。她一跳舞，整個B站都要跟著扭——屬於「粉毛切開都是黑的」反面教材（她是粉毛切開是混沌）。
tags: 無害的臉有害的整活力

furina.title: 小蛋糕水神·戲精の王
furina.note: 你以為她是高調Diva，後來發現她是獨自演了五百年獨角戲的苦逼打工人。她最狠的不是演技，是明明快碎了還要端著紅酒杯說「一切都在我計劃之中」。建議頒發「原神最佳表演獎」和「最慘打工人獎」。

furukawa-nagisa.title: 糰子大家族·堅韌的白雪
furukawa-nagisa.note: 看起來像個風一吹就會倒的軟弱少女，缺乏自信到常常停滯不前。但實際上，她擁有一顆比誰都堅韌的心，一旦為了愛的人，哪怕面臨絕望也能咬牙走下去。她那如春風般的溫柔，擁有讓人不知不覺落淚的魔力。

gotoh-hitori.title: 社恐蒸發型吉他英雄
gotoh-hitori.note: 在網路上她是吉他上帝，在現實中她是垃圾桶後面的霉菌。她不是內向，她是把「我先死一下」發展成了完整的表演體系——建議申遺。彈幕常用語：「波奇，你還是找個地縫鑽進去吧」。

haibara-ai.title: A藥之母·科學界冷面吐槽役
haibara-ai.note: 你以為她是冷血無情的科學家，其實她是全劇最清醒的吐槽擔當。日常工作除了研究解藥，就是用冰冷的語言給某位死神小學生踩剎車。她的冷幽默就像她發明的藥一樣致命——屬於「不開口則已，一開口刀刀暴擊」的典範。

hakurei-reimu.title: 貧窮但能打·摸魚巫女
hakurei-reimu.note: 神社窮得養蚊子，但她人氣養活了整個東方圈。你以為她在擺爛，其實她只是把「贏」字寫在了懶狗皮下面。名言：「沒錢？那就把惹事的揍一頓」。屬於「窮得理直氣壯」的典範。

hatsune-miku.title: 世界第一的公主殿下（勞務派遣版）
hatsune-miku.note: 你以為她是歌姬，其實她是二次元公務員——演唱會排期比社畜加班還密，蔥色雙馬尾一晃，彈幕自動刷「世最可」，哪怕你根本沒聽清歌詞。屬於那種「我不認識她，但我刷過她的表情包」的典中典。

hirasawa-yui.title: 絕對音感·點心終結者
hirasawa-yui.note: 你以為她是來組樂隊的，其實她是來喝下午茶的。擁有滿級音樂天賦卻全點在了吃零食和給吉他穿衣服上。如果人生是一場考試，她連準考證都能忘帶，但最後總能用莫名其妙的運氣和感染力奇蹟般地及格。

hoshino-ruby.title: 天生發光體·執念狂魔
hoshino-ruby.note: 帶著前世的沉重執念和滿級天賦，你天生就是要吃這碗聚光燈飯的人。表面上是個無腦元氣笨蛋，內心卻燃燒著讓人畏懼的勝負欲。為了那個閃閃發光的夢想，你甚至願意把整個人生包裝成最華麗的謊言，在舞台上連命都可以不要。

ijichi-nijika.title: 下北澤大天使·紐帶締結者
ijichi-nijika.note: 你是那種能把散掉的人重新攏回來的人。你給人的安全感不只來自熱情，更來自你會主動照顧氣氛、分擔壓力，並在所有人都快亂成一團時先一步把局面穩住。屬於「看起來像陽角氣氛組，實際上是團隊續命核心」的類型。

inaba-meguru.title: 偽現充學妹·熱鬧外殼下的獨處玩家
inaba-meguru.note: 你看起來像那種一出場就能把氣氛拉起來的現充學妹，笑得很自然，接話也很快，好像天生就知道怎麼和所有人打成一片。但熟一點才會發現，你的外向更像一層練出來的殼：會活躍氣氛，懂得裝沒事，也懂得把真正的孤獨藏好。屬於「第一眼像社交王者，第二眼發現其實是高攻低防獨處玩家」的類型。

izumi-konata.title: 高濃度宅神·梗比行動力高但腦子轉得飛快
izumi-konata.note: 你像那種在現實裡未必最勤快，但在自己熟悉的梗區、番區和遊戲區裡會瞬間切到高速模式的人。你不是傳統社牛，更像熟人局裡的高機動吐槽役，反應快、梗密度高、還很會把任何話題三步之內拐進二次元。屬於「看著有點擺，其實只是把性能全點在喜歡的地方」的類型。

jia-ran.title: 可愛即正義·梗密度超標體
jia-ran.note: 你最大的能力不是可愛，是把可愛做成高頻武器。別人賣萌是一種狀態，你賣萌是一種生產力——她一開口，彈幕自動變成「然然我的然然」，哪怕她只是在念廣告詞。建議備好胰島素，甜度超標。

kagamine-rin.title: 元氣小惡魔·壓路機駕駛員
kagamine-rin.note: 你以為她只是個會賣萌的元氣少女，其實惹急了她能開著壓路機從你臉上碾過去。她的活力不是用來治癒你的，是用來折騰你的——屬於「只要我不尷尬，頭疼的就是你」的典型。建議隨身攜帶橘子保命。

kaguya-chojikuu.title: 神秘頂流AI·把整個創作宇宙當直播間在看
kaguya-chojikuu.note: 你像那種存在感很高、卻不會把情緒直接攤在臉上的人。你看起來離大家有點遠，像懸在高處的虛擬偶像或神明 NPC，但實際上又一直在默默看著每個人怎麼創作、怎麼發光。屬於「表面像高位冷感設定怪，底層其實很在意整個世界運轉得夠不夠自由熱鬧」的類型。

kaltsit.title: 羅德島基石·Mon3tr牌外置執行力
kaltsit.note: 你不是單純高冷，你只是已經把局勢、風險、傷亡和後手全算過一遍了。表面像醫務室裡最不好惹的那位主任，開口不是命令就是醫囑，情緒穩定得像根本不會波動；但真到殘局，她又會把責任、承諾和所有人的命一起扛起來。屬於「嘴上像在給你下最後通牒，實際上已經把你從滅團線拽回來了」的類型。

kaname-madoka.title: 粉毛神明·世界觀補丁
kaname-madoka.note: 前期以為她是需要保護的軟妹，後期發現她直接給自己寫了新規則。她不是成長，她是作業系統升級——從「魔法少女」到「宇宙補丁」，一鍵重啟。建議觀看時備好紙巾和速效救心丸。
tags: 魔法少女系統崩潰原因

kasugano-sora.title: 病弱宅女·極致的依賴
kasugano-sora.note: 平時是一副沉默寡言、帶著黑兔布偶的病弱宅女模樣，習慣用冷漠和帶刺的語言掩飾內心的極度不安。她對外界的社交毫無興趣，但在卸下所有心防後，那份不顧一切、幾乎令人窒息的依賴感足以打破所有世俗的常規。屬於「只要認定你，連世界都可以不要」的極端純粹型。

kato-megumi.title: 聖人惠·隱形控場真神
kato-megumi.note: 初見時你甚至記不住她的臉，彷彿自帶光學隱形迷彩。沒有明顯的喜怒哀樂，沒有誇張的二次元屬性，但就是能在所有人打得不可開交時，用最平淡的語氣拋出最致命的吐槽。你以為她是路人，其實她是捏著劇本的唯一真神。

kinomoto-sakura.title: 初代萌王·治愈系魔法使
kinomoto-sakura.note: 初代萌王，她的那句「絕對、大丈夫だよ」堪稱能治癒一切精神內耗的終極咒語。你最大的優點不是單純開朗，而是總能帶著一點天然和真誠把複雜的事也往前推。別人覺得麻煩時，你會先上手；別人害怕時，你反而會用很輕的方式把氣氛托住。屬於「像春天一樣看著軟，實際非常能打」的類型。

kita-ikuyo.title: 行走的閃光彈·社交刺客
kita-ikuyo.note: 只要她站在那裡，周圍就會自動生成閃瞎眼的「陽角濾鏡」。交際能力點滿，能在三秒內和任何人稱兄道弟，堪稱社恐患者的天然天敵與救贖。雖然有過買錯貝斯就提桶跑路的黑歷史，但只要她一笑，你就只能原諒她了。

kitagawa-marin.title: 純愛辣妹·行動力超載的宅女之光
kitagawa-marin.note: 誰能拒絕一個把「喜歡」大聲說出來，而且行動力爆表、拉著你一起瘋狂出Cos的純情辣妹呢？你是那種會把「喜歡」直接掛在臉上、看到別人認真做喜歡的事也會立刻兩眼發光的人。你不只是外向，最厲害的是你會把身邊人的熱情一起點起來。屬於「自己亮就算了，還會順手把別人也帶亮」的類型。

kitashirakawa-tamako.title: 商店街團寵·打糕店招牌
kitashirakawa-tamako.note: 滿腦子都是年糕的商店街團寵，神經大條到連別人對自己的喜歡都察覺不到。她那種毫無防備的天然呆屬性，能輕易把任何緊張的氣氛化解成軟糯的日常。名言大概是：沒有什麼事情是吃一口年糕解決不了的！

kousaka-kirino.title: 人生贏家·硬核隱性宅
kousaka-kirino.note: 在外面是成績運動全能的完美模特，在家裡是會逼著老哥玩妹系遊戲的究極宅女。她的傲嬌不是加分項，而是本體——嘴上罵著「噁心」，實際心裡可能已經在瘋狂動搖。屬於那種需要極大耐心才能攻略的「雷區舞者」。

kusanagi-nene.title: 社恐毒舌·天才遊戲少女
kusanagi-nene.note: 現實中是個嚴重社恐、看到生人就想找地縫鑽進去的自閉少女；但只要給她一個手把或鍵盤，馬上化身為毒舌輸出機，噴得對手找不著北。然而只要站上她真正熱愛的舞台，那份極具穿透力的歌聲又會耀眼得讓人移不開視線。

kushima-kamome.title: 海盜船長·帶著行李箱的冒險少女
kushima-kamome.note: 拉著大行李箱在島上徘徊的神秘少女，手裡拿著一張陳舊的藏寶圖。性格自由奔放又帶著成熟的氣質，喜歡三角形的甜點。她說自己在尋找海盜船停泊的地方，但行李箱裡到底裝著什麼，她絕對不會告訴任何人。那句「出發吧，再一次，向著有海盜船的地方」背後，藏著一個關於友情與告別的夏日故事。

luo-tianyi.title: 吃貨殿下·溫柔錦鯉
luo-tianyi.note: 表面上是個能用歌聲治癒人心的溫柔仙女，背地裡卻是個能把劇組吃破產的超級大胃王。她最大的超能力不是飆高音，而是在乾飯時展現出的驚人行動力。屬於「只要吃飽了就什麼都好說」的純粹生物。

luo-xiaohei.title: 見習執行者·羅小黑
luo-xiaohei.note: 雖然小黑年紀尚幼，卻有著遠超同齡人水準的戰鬥能力；只有在親近的人面前，小黑才會表現出他稚氣的一面，而在眾人面前，他常是一副寡言少語的樣子。但他在相處過程中表現出的不苟言笑也讓不少人產生了退卻的心思，但那並非拒絕你的訊號，只是他刻意想要展現給你的可靠形象。

makise-kurisu.title: 傲嬌天才·助手
makise-kurisu.note: 18歲拿到大學學位的天才腦科學家，嘴上說「我對這種非科學話題沒興趣」，身體卻很誠實地留在Lab裡幫你修微波爐。你給人的第一印象是高冷難接近，但相處久了會發現你只是不擅長表達柔軟的一面——明明很在意卻要用「笨蛋」來掩飾。屬於「表面像冰山，內心其實一直在偷偷觀察你」的類型。

matikanetannhauser.title: 祭典曼波擔當·一開口就讓全場進入抽象歡樂區
matikanetannhauser.note: 你身上有一種很難嚴肅起來的快樂污染力。哪怕本來只是普通地出現一下，也會因為腦迴路太有節目效果，莫名把整個場子的氣氛帶歪。屬於「不是傳統意義上的靠譜，但一定是最難忘的那個」的類型。

misaka-mikoto.title: 硬幣電磁炮·常盤台大姐頭
misaka-mikoto.note: 別人吵架靠嘴，她吵架靠三倍音速硬幣。嘴上「我才不管」，行動上已經衝到最前面扛傷害——屬於「嘴上傲，身體誠」的經典款女主。建議搭配BGM《Only My Railgun》食用，效果更佳。
tags: 超電磁炮實為硬幣發射器
嘴上說不管身體很誠實

misumi-uika.title: 溫柔皮下的劇情變量
misumi-uika.note: 你給人的第一印象是「應該很好相處」，但真正危險的地方在於：你自己也未必完全知道自己下一步會做什麼——屬於「溫柔型不定時炸彈」。建議遠離，除非你享受被炸的刺激。

miyazono-kaori.title: 自由的靈魂·不羈的演奏者
miyazono-kaori.note: 你就像一陣無法捕捉的春風，蠻橫地闖入別人的黑白世界並強行塗上色彩。你不按規矩出牌，把每一次登台都當成生命的最後一次狂歡。你給所有人留下了最刻骨銘心的春天，自己卻只願意當一個任性的「騙子」。

mortis.title: 異相人格·冷面舞台幽靈
mortis.note: 這不是單純的安靜，而是像把真實情緒鎖進另一個舞台殼裡。你給人的感覺更像一個隨時會改寫氛圍的變數，克制、陌生，而且帶著明確的攻擊性輪廓。

murasame.title: 拔刀白給·合法蘿莉神明
murasame.note: 你像那種平時會把長輩架子端得很足、關鍵時刻卻比誰都容易臉紅破防的人。嘴上總說自己見多識廣，真碰上靈異和驚嚇環節又會瞬間縮回安全區。屬於「明明想當保護別人的神明，結果更需要別人護著」的類型。

myrtle.title: 大將軍(自稱)·來自地下世界的元氣少女
myrtle.note: 充滿活力的杜林族女孩，自稱統率第一大道及三條商店街的「大將軍」。雖然身高只有131cm，但戰場上的感染力和指揮水準讓人刮目相看。來自地下世界的她，是少數不瞌睡的杜林族，對地上世界充滿好奇。喜歡收集「寶物」，但是卻連工牌都能弄丟。

nagasaki-soyo.title: 溫柔刀·情緒精算師
nagasaki-soyo.note: 你看起來最會照顧人，其實最會把話說得讓人後勁很大。她沒罵你，但你已經跪在鍵盤前反思人生——屬於「笑面虎中的戰術大師」。建議交往前先買好保險。
tags: 道歉讓你自我反省三天

nakano-azusa.title: 傲嬌學妹·被玩弄的吉他手
nakano-azusa.note: 輕音部裡唯一的常識人和秩序守護者，平時總把「要好好練習」掛在嘴邊，但只要學姐們遞上一塊蛋糕、套上貓耳，馬上就會滿臉通紅地淪陷。屬於典型的「嘴上說著不要，身體卻很誠實」的認真型學妹，好欺負程度滿分。

nakano-nino.title: 戀愛暴走機車·傲嬌教科書
nakano-nino.note: 一開始像隻渾身帶刺的刺蝟，為了保護妹妹們甚至能直接給你端上一杯加料的水。但只要攻略成功，她的傲嬌濾鏡會瞬間粉碎，變成一輛完全沒有剎車的戀愛暴走機車。屬於「只要認定了你，哪怕撞南牆也要把你和牆一起撞倒」的究極直球選手。

neuro-sama.title: 失控語料核反應堆
neuro-sama.note: 你不是在整活，而是在做機率學抽卡。披著人畜無害的軟萌外皮，核心卻是個連導播都捏一把汗的亂序發射器。一旦你開口，哪怕語氣再自然，也能神不知鬼不覺地把場子帶偏到太平洋去。
tags: 可愛外殼下的高頻偏航

nishikigi-chisato.title: 人形自走外掛·不殺的Lycoris
nishikigi-chisato.note: 你以為她只是個成天樂呵呵、喜歡到處貼貼的咖啡店看板娘，實際上她是能在槍林彈雨裡跳舞的頂級特工。她最大的魅力在於，哪怕背負著沉重的宿命，依然選擇用最明媚的笑容和橡膠彈去擁抱世界。和她在一起，你的生活絕對不會有無聊兩個字，只有脫軌和狂飆。

nishimiya-shoko.title: 無聲的溫柔·悲憫的贖罪者
nishimiya-shoko.note: 世界對她充滿了不公與惡意，但她卻依然選擇用最溫柔的微笑去擁抱一切。她總是習慣性把所有的錯攬在自己身上，在無聲的世界裡一次次試圖與他人和解。這種近乎卑微的善良，讓人只想穿越螢幕去給她一個大大的擁抱。

nukumizu-kaju.title: 完美妹妹·兄控保護程式常駐後台
nukumizu-kaju.note: 你平時像那種已經把生活流程全部最佳化完畢的高性能妹妹模板，學習、家務、待人接物都像出廠校準過。但只要話題切到哥哥，整個人的情緒管理模組就會瞬間超頻。屬於「平時是完美UI，核心執行緒其實全綁在一個人身上」的類型。

oyama-mahiro.title: 廢柴尼特·被迫變身的妹妹
oyama-mahiro.note: 你以為她是個天真可愛的國中生，其實軀殼裡裝了個無可救藥的死宅。從最開始的瘋狂抗拒，到後來的「女孩子真香」，她用親身經歷展示了什麼叫極度被動的人格。每天的終極目標只是想縮在房間裡打遊戲，卻總是被命運（和親妹妹）安排得明明白白。

phoebe.title: 隱海修會·虔誠聖職者
phoebe.note: 因為船難失去雙親，最終在隱海修會成為一名虔誠的聖職者。她將過去的創傷轉化為對世界的溫柔與悲憫，像靜謐的海洋一般包容著所有的苦難。你看著她，就會覺得一切浮躁都能被治癒——屬於標準的「靈魂避風港」。

phrolova.title: 憂傷指揮家·把理想國寫進喪鐘的人
phrolova.note: 你給人的感覺不是普通高冷，而是那種會安靜站在場中央、卻讓所有人自動收聲的危險存在。表面上情緒很淡，實際內核全是被悲傷和執念擰出來的控制力，像是在重新給世界定調的人。

qb.title: 孵化者·宇宙熱寂的阻止者
qb.note: 外表是可愛的白色貓型生物，實則是來自外星的「孵化者」。沒有感情，以絕對理性的功利主義行事。會實現少女的任何願望，代價是成為魔法少女——但不會告訴你，絕望之後會變成魔女。從不撒謊，只是「省略了部分說明」。認為犧牲少數人拯救宇宙是合理的交換。名言：「你們人類為什麼會對這種事情感到憤怒呢？」

rem.title: 鬼族女僕·究極奉獻者
rem.note: 平時是家務萬能、溫柔體貼的完美女僕，一旦你觸發了她的信任開關，她連命都可以不要。不過友情提示：在取得信任之前，請小心她手裡那把帶著倒刺的流星錘。屬於那種「只要你別作死，她就是人間天使」的奉獻型人格。

reze.title: 危險甜心·溫柔像真的，危險也是真的
reze.note: 你給人的第一感覺往往很容易讓人卸下防備：親近、輕鬆、會接話，也很會製造那種「終於有人認真看見我了」的錯覺。但你的內核並不適合被簡單歸類成戀愛向濾鏡，很多溫柔背後都帶著任務、試探與風險，而最複雜的地方在於那份靠近又不是全假。屬於「接近時像夏夜晚風，翻臉時像爆炸前最後一秒安靜」的類型。

runami-yachiyo.title: 月讀全服客服總監（兼頂流歌姬）
runami-yachiyo.note: 你像那種會把整個虛擬世界當家來養的人：表面是營業滿分的頂流，實際是偷偷把每個路過的人都照顧到的賽博白月光。你有很強的表達欲和感染力，但真正稀有的地方，是你不是為了被看見才發光，而是因為你真的在意這個場子、在意這裡的人，也在意大家能不能玩得開心。
tags: 全服白月光兼產品經理

sakagami-tomoyo.title: 武帝·為了櫻花樹的會長
sakagami-tomoyo.note: 曾經是打遍小鎮無敵手、能把人踢在半空中下不來的不良少女，現在卻是認真負責、背負一切的學生會長。戰鬥力雖然爆表，但在喜歡的人面前卻總是展現出笨拙又惹人憐愛的一面。是一個把「責任」和「愛」都死死扛在肩上的武帝。

sakurajima-mai.title: 野生兔女郎·國民級學姊
sakurajima-mai.note: 你以為能撩到她，其實一直被她在智商和情商上瘋狂拉扯。表面上是個高不可攀、行事果斷的國民級女演員，背地裡卻能為了喜歡的人付出一切。她的愛就像她的毒舌一樣，刀刀致命，又甜得讓人上頭。

shiina-mayuri.title: 命運天使·純潔透明的星辰
shiina-mayuri.note: 她的存在本身就像一個溫柔的錨點——不管世界線怎麼變動、不管時間機器把一切攪得多亂，她都會笑著對你說一句「嘟嘟嚕」。你不是那種會主動解決問題的人，但你有一種神奇的能力：只要你在，周圍的人就會覺得「好像也沒那麼糟」。屬於「看起來最柔弱，實際上撐住了整個團隊精神狀態」的類型。
tags: 真由理的懷錶怎麼停了

shiina-taki.title: 暴躁鼓手·嘴硬護短
shiina-taki.note: 你的人設關鍵詞叫「別惹我，但我其實會管你」。外表是攻擊性，內核是責任感，只是表達方式比較像炸藥包——炸完還幫你收拾殘局。建議常備滅火器。

shinomiya-kaguya.title: 純情財閥·戀愛腦補帝
shinomiya-kaguya.note: 表面上是完美無瑕的財閥大小姐、冷酷無情的計謀家，實際上是個連智慧型手機都不會用的純情戀愛腦。她的人生格言是「先告白的人在戀愛中是輸家」，然後為了讓對方先開口，可以調動整個財閥的資源演一齣大戲。屬於「智商換情商」的典型。

shirai-kuroko.title: 風紀執行位·公務模式與姊姊大人過熱的疊加態
shirai-kuroko.note: 你以為她只是個每天高呼「姊姊大人」的痴漢，但其實她是常盤台唯一的 Level 4 空間移動能力者兼學園都市治安維護鐵血風紀委員。她把「對姊姊大人過熱」和「絕對的正義感」這兩種截然相反的屬性完美融合——工作時雷厲風行、辦案果斷，一旦切到姊姊大人頻道就立刻系統超頻。屬於「公務模式和感情模式切換速度比空間移動還快」的典範。

shorekeeper.title: 黑海岸之主·為你降生的資料
shorekeeper.note: 誕生於資料的星海，原本只是個毫無感情、負責維繫世界運轉的觀測者，卻因為你的存在而長出了名為「私心」的靈魂。她能把整個世界的命運與機率算得清清楚楚，但她所有的神性與計算，最終都只為保護你這一件事而服務。

suzumiya-haruhi.title: SOS團長·世界系神明
suzumiya-haruhi.note: 普通人在你眼裡一無是處，你的雷達只接收外星人、未來人和超能力者的信號。你不是在尋找樂子，你是在強迫這個無聊的世界為你全速運轉。這種「只要自己爽，世界毀滅也無所謂」的恐怖執行力，讓你成為了最高級別的麻煩製造機。
tags: 我對普通人類沒有興趣

tachibana-kanade.title: 死後世界的天使·麻婆豆腐狂熱粉
tachibana-kanade.note: 你給人的第一印象往往是安靜、冷硬、難以靠近，像那種會把規則執行到底的人。但真正的核心並不是冷漠，而是你早就習慣在不被理解的情況下繼續守住自己該守的東西。屬於「高冷只是外殼，溫柔卻一直在做事」的類型。

takamatsu-tomori.title: 咕咕嘎嘎
takamatsu-tomori.note: 你不是在說話，你是在往空氣裡投擲散文詩。你最大的特點不是脆弱，是脆弱得特別有文學性——別人哭是傷心，你哭是藝術行為。MyGO團內指定「情感ATM」，取款請輕按。

takanashi-rikka.title: 邪王真眼使·中二病重患
takanashi-rikka.note: 平時眼罩繃帶齊上陣，滿嘴「不可視境界線」，結果只要被輕輕敲一下頭就會立刻抱頭蹲防。屬於典型的「戰鬥全靠腦補，實戰全靠抱大腿」。她雖然活在自己的設定裡，卻對感情有著最純粹的執著。

tanikaze-amane.title: 重度網癮·賽博衝浪達人
tanikaze-amane.note: 在網路世界裡，她是無所不知、滿嘴抽象熱詞的衝浪巨佬；在現實中，她是個離開電腦就會迅速枯萎的社恐廢柴。她的社交能量全靠看直播發彈幕來維持，如果你試圖把她從房間裡拖出去，她可能會當場融化。屬於「電子海膽」的究極進化型態。

togawa-sakiko.title: 高壓·命運の甲方
togawa-sakiko.note: 你不是控制欲強，你只是覺得大家離了你都要出事。精神像在開董事會+在懸崖邊跑馬拉松——名言：「別問為什麼，因為我就是規則」。建議遠離，除非你想體驗每天被Deadline追著跑的感覺。

tokai-teio.title: 不屈的奇蹟·帝皇舞步
tokai-teio.note: 永遠充滿活力，做夢都想成為像「皇帝」一樣無敗的三冠賽馬娘。就算遭遇了足以終結職業生涯的粉碎性骨折，也能在所有人都不看好的絕境中奇蹟復活。屬於那種「只要她還在場上奔跑，你就會忍不住被她的光芒感染並大聲歡呼」的耀眼存在。

tokisaki-kurumi.title: 最惡精靈·優雅的瘋批
tokisaki-kurumi.note: 把「優雅」和「瘋批」完美結合的病嬌界天花板。你很會控制場面，也很會控制自己想給別人看到的樣子。外表優雅、說話得體、甚至顯得很有禮貌，但真正的核心從來不會隨便交出去。屬於「你以為她在曖昧，其實她可能已經把局勢推到下一階段了」的類型。

tomori-nao.title: 冷臉會長·單體隱身執法記錄儀
tomori-nao.note: 你平時像那種情緒顯示面板預設關閉的學生會執法程序，說話淡、下手準、看起來很不好惹。但真正的核心不是冷，而是你已經習慣把判斷、風險和責任先一步扛起來。屬於「不是特別愛解釋自己，但局勢交給她確實會穩很多」的類型。
tags: 能力者保護程序運行中

tomotake-yoshino.title: 古板巫女·反差萌絕緣體
tomotake-yoshino.note: 你看起來像那種會把規矩、責任和秩序寫進日程表的人，外在克制，內裡卻藏著很軟的一面。平時越想維持端正穩重，越容易在熟人面前因為一點反差萌暴露真實情緒。屬於「看著最不好接近，熟了反而最有溫度」的類型。

uika-nyubara.title: 流量感人格·樂子人運營
uika-nyubara.note: 你有一種「明明在發瘋，但發得很會經營」的現代感。人設切換像開濾鏡，情緒表達像在給自己的人生做運營——建議出書《如何把發瘋變成流量密碼》。

vertin.title: 暴雨中梭巡的司辰
vertin.note: 從活潑少女到沉靜的引路人，隸屬於聖洛夫基金會的「司辰」。不是最強的戰士，卻是不可替代的「鑰匙」。冷靜沉穩的少女沒有多少可以相信的人，因為自有記憶起，她便很清楚自己是獨自一人。

violet-evergarden.title: 自動手記人偶·把「我愛你」學成終身課題
violet-evergarden.note: 你給人的第一感覺像一份被裝訂得過分整齊的說明書：安靜、精確、幾乎沒有多餘情緒。但真正稀有的地方在於，你不是沒有感情，而是會把最重要的情感一點一點學會、背熟，再認真地交還給別人。屬於「表面像冷金屬，內裡卻在緩慢長出體溫」的類型。

wakaba-mutsumi.title: 靜音核彈·面無表情的問題兒童
wakaba-mutsumi.note: 你不是情緒少，你是情緒都藏在別人看不懂的地方。平時像背景板，卻總在關鍵節點露出讓人不安的執拗和遲鈍感——屬於「安靜得過頭，反而讓人不敢移開視線」的類型。
tags: 不說話則已一說話刀死你

yahata-umiri.title: 不響但很重·冷面執行官
yahata-umiri.note: 你不製造drama，但你通常是drama裡最能收場的人。別人還在情緒波動，你已經開始處理後果了——屬於「沉默の清道夫，穩得一批」。建議有事找她，沒事別煩她。

yamada-ryo.title: 吃草貝斯手·超脫的屑
yamada-ryo.note: 被叫作「怪人」會暗自竊喜的孤高貝斯手。人生哲學極度自我，有錢全砸在樂器上，沒錢就拔路邊的野草吃，甚至還能面不改色地騙隊友的錢買零食。你以為她高冷深沉，其實她只是懶得遵守人類社會的常識。純粹的、脫離了低級趣味的「屑」。

yanami-anna.title: 人氣敗犬·能吃能聊還能硬撐體面
yanami-anna.note: 你表面像那種隨時都能把氣氛帶熱的班級門面，實際上戀愛戰績已經被系統提前判負。能吃、能聊、能把難受先咽下去，嘴上還要裝得像沒事一樣。屬於「越是看起來活潑，越容易在夜裡偷偷掉線」的類型。

yo-rana.title: 野生·天賦怪貓貓
yo-rana.note: 別人組樂隊靠溝通，你組樂隊靠「出現」。你不是難懂，你只是懶得向這個世界解釋——彈就完了，哪那麼多廢話。建議飼養時投喂蕎麥麵，不要強行擼貓。

yor-forger.title: 荊棘公主·腦迴路清奇的殺手
yor-forger.note: 表面上是溫婉可人、連切菜都能切到自己手的賢妻良母，背地裡卻是代號「荊棘公主」的頂尖殺手。她的腦迴路跟她的物理戰鬥力一樣異於常人，遇到解決不了的人際交往問題，第一反應往往是「是不是把他偷偷殺掉比較好」。

yuigahama-yui.title: 溫柔緩衝墊·讀空氣達人
yuigahama-yui.note: 你總是習慣性地迎合周圍，生怕破壞哪怕一絲群體的平衡。別人以為你是天生的無腦樂天派，其實你只是把「讀空氣」練成了被動技能。在這群充滿彆扭怪的人際關係裡，你那份有些笨拙的溫柔是唯一的潤滑劑——雖然代價往往是把委屈留給自己。

yukinoshita-yukino.title: 冰冷侍奉部·高嶺之花
yukinoshita-yukino.note: 像一把冷冰冰的手術刀，一開口就能精準切除你的自尊心。她不是討厭你，她只是討厭這個不完美的世界（以及不完美的你）。但在那層堅不可摧的冰甲和完美主義下，其實藏著一個連依賴別人都不會的笨蛋。

yuuki-asuna.title: 閃光之劍·全能型正宮
yuuki-asuna.note: 上能拔劍打前線砍翻BOSS，下能買菜做飯提供滿分情緒價值。你不是那種只會安慰人的溫柔派，你更像會一邊安慰你一邊把問題直接處理掉的人。你對重要的人很上心，也很難對陷入困境的人坐視不管。屬於「氣質很像白月光，做事方式卻很像隊伍主心骨」的類型。

zero-two.title: 叫龍少女·危險的甜味
zero-two.note: 帶著危險氣息的粉髮機甲駕駛員，一句「Darling」直接喊到人骨頭裡發酥。你身上有一種很強的「別靠太近但又讓人忍不住想靠近」的危險感。你不是好接近的溫柔掛，而是那種一旦認定一個目標或一個人，就會把所有情緒都燒過去的類型。屬於「明知危險，但也想靠近的致命誘惑」。

aisaka-taiga.title: Palm-Size Tiger · Wooden-Sword Pure-Love Crusader
aisaka-taiga.note: Barely over 140 cm tall, yet her temper could blow the roof off — the "Palm-Size Tiger." Always armed with a wooden sword, aggressively hostile, but with self-care skills stuck at absolute zero. Peel back that prickly, violent shell and you'll find a girl who craves love so desperately she can't even figure out her own feelings.

akemi-homura.title: Observer of Loops · Love's Ultimate Fanatic
akemi-homura.note: Started out as a timid braided girl with glasses, then single-handedly forged herself into a cold-blooded arms dealer — all to save the one person who was her salvation. She crossed countless loops of despair, even usurping a god's power, just to trade for that person's ordinary happiness. Her love is suffocatingly heavy, yet terrifyingly magnificent.
tags: Will Fight the World for You

akiyama-mio.title: The Blue-White Bowl · Cowardly Bassist
akiyama-mio.note: She's got the face of a cool, mature beauty, yet one ghost story is enough to send her into a full panic meltdown. As the team's sole voice of reason, she teeters on the edge of a breakdown every day just trying to keep order. Don't let her serious demeanor fool you — the lyrics she writes are so sickeningly sweet they'll make grown men weep.

alya-kujou.title: Silver-Haired Honor Student · The Encrypted Flirtation of a Perfect Ice Queen
alya-kujou.note: On the outside, she's an untouchable silver-haired straight-A student; in private, she's constantly mumbling embarrassingly sweet lines in Russian. Your first impression is always "hard to approach, impossibly high standards, probably grading everyone around her at all times." But the moment someone makes it onto your "exceptions list," the walls quietly crumble — you just won't admit it. The type who "looks like she's presiding over a cold courtroom, but is secretly leaving the back door unlocked for you."

amane-suzuha.title: Part-Time Warrior · The Girl from the Future
amane-suzuha.note: A time traveler who rode a bicycle back from 2036 — far better at diving in to change the world than sitting around pondering life. You have a kind of pure execution power: once you lock onto a target, you charge in and fight to the bitter end. You couldn't care less what others think of you, but when it comes to the things and people who matter, your persistence borders on obsession. The type who "never says a word, but will shoulder the entire world through action."

amiya.title: Rhodes Island Leader · the Sweet Overlord
amiya.note: On the surface, a sweet, adorable assistant who's always reminding you not to slack off; in reality, a young leader carrying the entire fate of Rhodes Island on her shoulders. She possesses a composure and decisiveness far beyond her years, yet the moment you're by her side, she breaks into the dependent smile of an ordinary girl.

arima-kana.title: Baking-Soda-Licking Child Star · Ultimate Hat Rack
arima-kana.note: Her mouth spits the sharpest venom, yet her heart craves attention more than anyone. As a former child prodigy who "can cry on cue in ten seconds," she channels every ounce of insecurity and frustration into raw competitive fire on stage. Praise her just a little, and her affection skyrockets like a rocket — the textbook "support me and I'll shine for you" ultimate tsundere.

artoria-pendragon.title: Ahoge Knight King · Excalibur of Vows
artoria-pendragon.note: The ahoge-topped King of Knights — normally a stern, strait-laced monarch who lives by chivalric code, but come mealtime transforms into a bottomless pit capable of bankrupting the Emiya household. You come across as rock-solid, nearly impossible to shake — the kind who holds principles and duty to near-unreasonable standards. It's not that you're cold; you're just too used to putting yourself last. The type who "even when their heart is wavering, will still stand tall like a drawn sword."
tags: The King Knows Not Human Hearts

asuka-langley.title: The Red Comet of Tsundere
asuka-langley.note: "Who do you think you are" is tsundere for "please understand me." Her lectures spike your blood pressure; her breakdowns end up in your screenshot folder — the textbook "argument BGM auto-plays on entry" character. Recommended pairing: danmaku reading "Asuka broke down again."
tags: Who Do You Think You Are

atri.title: High-Performance (Self-Proclaimed) · The Miraculous Android
atri.note: You're the type who puts all your energy, bluntness, and desire to be there for others right out in the open. You call yourself high-performance, but what truly moves people is the raw sincerity and unfiltered emotion underneath. Even in the worst circumstances, you'll scrape together whatever warmth you have and share it with those around you. The type who "looks breezy and bright on the surface, but can carry more weight than anyone at the core."

awa-subaru.title: Acting Drummer · The Team's Glue
awa-subaru.note: In a band full of prickly personalities ready to explode at any moment, you're the only one who knows how to use "acting" to hold the situation together — a cunning adult-in-training. You know exactly how to play along with grown-ups' expectations, so you smash all your rebellion and frustration into the drum beats instead. It's not that you don't have a temper — you just know exactly when to go wild and when to play nice.

ayachi-nene.title: Pure-Love Witch · Graceful Shell, Gentle Internal Turmoil
ayachi-nene.note: First impression: composed, reliable, handles chaos without letting things spiral. But once responsibility, secrets, and feelings start stacking, you quietly absorb all the pressure. Looks like the one calming everyone down; actually the one who most needs gentle care.

ayanami-rei.title: Three Nulls Saint · Cold Pale Skin Ceiling
ayanami-rei.note: Her total dialogue barely tops your daily forum scroll, yet her popularity ranks top three in all of history. Standing there, she IS the dictionary definition of \"cool and distant\" — you wouldn\'t dare ask for directions, afraid she\'d reply with "どうでもいい." (Not my problem.)
tags: Fewer Lines Than a Spam Post

azuma-seren.title: Abstract Diva · Fairy Design, Meme Engine Landing
azuma-seren.note: You give off the vibe of someone whose character art drops and everyone expects a graceful, composed, floating-in-midair type — then you open your mouth and immediately hijack the entire channel into bizarre comedy territory. It's not that you lack a beauty filter; it's just that your weirdness, raw personality, and absurd contrast keep stealing the spotlight. The type whose "lore reads like moonlit aristocracy, but actual performance is a chaos engine."

azusagawa-kaede.title: Panda PJs · the Hardworking Shut-In
azusagawa-kaede.note: A hardcore shut-in wrapped in panda pajamas, treating her big brother as the absolute center of her universe. Terrified of the outside world's gaze, she locked herself indoors — yet for her brother's sake, she'll summon every ounce of willpower to accomplish something as mundane as "walking two steps outside." Every time she gathers courage, it tugs at your heart so hard you want to buy her a truckload of pudding.

bilibili-22.title: Energetic Site Mascot · Fixes the Player, Creates New Bugs
bilibili-22.note: You're the type who rushes in to help first, only to realize halfway through that you might have made things even more chaotic. Your infectious energy is off the charts — when the mood dips, you'll try to pull it up; when a friend's in trouble, you'll step up first. The execution sometimes veers off into weird directions, though. The type who "may not be the most reliable, but is absolutely the most alive person in the room."

bilibili-33.title: Calm Tech Support · Battery-Saving Expression, Backend on Life Support
bilibili-33.note: You seem like the type who never starts the party and can barely be bothered to explain yourself — but the moment something breaks, everyone instinctively turns to you. You might not be the best at comforting people, but you're often the one who actually gets things fixed. The type who "looks like a low-power, emotionless shell on the surface, but is actually running the core backend thread."

cartethyia.title: Holy Martyr Vibes · Carrying Both Ideals and Their Price
cartethyia.note: You're not the type to broadcast your feelings — most of them get buried under bigger goals. What others see is calm, solemn detachment; those who know you better discover that beneath the stillness lies an incredibly heavy sense of responsibility. The type where "the more saintly she appears, the more she's already prepared to pay the price."

chihaya-anon.title: Light Social Butterfly · Scene Player
chihaya-anon.note: Your life strategy is "blend in first, figure it out later." Smooth on the surface, but you often charge in too fast and land in the drama yourself — no worries, you\'ll use new social skills to cover the old mess.

chitanda-eru.title: I'm Curious! · Heiress Radar of the Wealthy Farming Clan
chitanda-eru.note: You normally carry yourself with the poise of a perfectly raised heiress — polished, polite, impeccably measured. But the second something triggers your interest, you flip instantly from "dignified mode" into "interrogate-until-I-get-answers mode." You're not a loud protagonist engine — you're the type who drags everyone into the main quest with a single "I'm curious!"

cirno.title: ⑨ · The Strongest Idiot Fairy
cirno.note: Never got a math problem right, but never backed down from a fight either. Her greatest charm: she gets one-shot every time, yet always keeps that "I'm the strongest" confident grin — the absolute ceiling of the idiot world. Just being cute is enough. The Touhou fandom's officially designated "⑨" meme supplier.

doro.title: The Pink Demon · Psychic Hazard
doro.note: Her original form is the noble Pilgrim Dorothy, yet the internet abstracted her into this blank-staring, psychologically corrosive four-legged creature. You'll never know what's brewing behind that vacant smile, but the moment she appears, the entire channel's collective IQ takes a nosedive. Recommended: do not make eye contact.

edogawa-conan.title: Death God Elementary Schooler · Human Causality Weapon
edogawa-conan.note: Do not ask who the culprit is. Check their flight itinerary first. He has not even finished elementary school, yet he has already seen through human nature and turned Japan's crime map into a heat map. Famous line: "There is only one truth, but there are always two crime scenes." Best paired with a full paranormal investigation crew.

eis-taffy.title: Ace-Level Idol · Time-Travel Accidental Inventor
eis-taffy.note: Not just talkative — capable of stretching one line into a full segment. Looks like chaotic content; actually weaving rhythm, reactions, and persona management into one controlled bundle. Open stream, scene automatically organizes itself into structured chaos.

elaina.title: The Ashen Witch · Chill Observer Travel Blogger
elaina.note: You're not the type to force yourself into every storyline — more like a premium traveler who passes through, observes, and records along the way. Polite and restrained on the outside, clear-headed in judgment, never one to morally overload. But the moment the world gets interesting enough, your curiosity instantly kicks into gear. The type who "seems totally unfazed, but actually has zero resistance to a good story."

elysia.title: The Flawless Pink Fairy Miss♪
elysia.note: On the surface, a pink social butterfly who loves cuddles and spouts honeyed words; in truth, she turned "loving everyone" into a lifelong creed. She's not without sorrow — she simply chooses to leave her most radiant, flawless smile for the world. The kind of goddess who "brings her own pink spotlight the moment she enters." Keep tissues handy: you'll be smiling one moment and emotionally devastated the next.

emilia.title: Silver-Haired Half-Elf · E.M.T
emilia.note: She's often the one in the weakest position, yet still clumsily tries to take care of everyone else. Her gentleness carries a stubbornness that breaks your heart — she's the type who treats "I'm sorry" like a catchphrase and shoulders every responsibility herself. Makes you want to scream at the top of your lungs: E.M.T!

evil-neuro.title: Cold Bench Villain · Black Show Effect
evil-neuro.note: You perfectly merged aggression, control instincts, and chaos energy into a full villain performance. Razor-sharp on the surface, maximum pressure — but with precise calibration that keeps you from ever becoming fully irredeemable. An advanced tsundere variant.
tags: Smiling While Saying the Meanest Things

eyjafjalla.title: Gentle Nuke · the Blind Volcanologist
eyjafjalla.note: Beneath the frail, obedient underclassman exterior lies volcanic magic powerful enough to melt an entire battlefield in an instant. Oripathy is slowly stealing her hearing and sight, yet she remains devoted to pursuing her parents' volcanic research. That sweet "Senpai!" after every battle is the best painkiller against this wasteland's cruel world.

firefly.title: Firefly Burner · Light on the Outside, Heavy When It Counts
firefly.note: You come across as someone who speaks softly, moves lightly, and keeps emotions barely there — like you'd scatter in the wind. But when it's time to make a real decision, you turn iron-willed, even ready to stake yourself on the outcome. The type who "looks the most fragile, but can actually shoulder the most."

frieren.title: Millennium-Old Elf · Hobby Spell Collector
frieren.note: You come across as someone whose emotions always seem muted and reactions feel slow — not because you truly don't care, but because you habitually stand farther back to see the full picture before acting. You're great at saving your judgment and power for the most critical moments, yet you also quietly treasure the little things everyone else finds meaningless. The type who "looks like they're spacing out every day, but delivers staggering weight when it matters."

fujiwara-chika.title: Natural Chaos · Pink-Hair Nuke
fujiwara-chika.note: You thought she was the mascot. It turns out she is the chaos engine. The moment she opens her mouth, the whole story swerves into absurdity. The moment she dances, the entire internet starts moving with her. A reverse textbook case of "pink hair hides darkness" - in her case, pink hair hides pure chaos.

furina.title: Cake-Loving Hydro Archon · Drama Queen Supreme
furina.note: You thought she was a high-profile Diva. Turns out she's a miserable wage slave who performed a one-woman show for five hundred years straight. Her most savage trait isn't her acting — it's the way she'll hold a wine glass and declare "everything is going according to plan" while literally falling apart. Someone hand her the "Genshin Best Actress" and "Most Tragic Worker" awards.

furukawa-nagisa.title: Dango Daikazoku · the Resilient Snow
furukawa-nagisa.note: She looks like a fragile girl who'd blow over in the wind, so lacking in confidence she often stalls completely. But in truth, she possesses a heart tougher than anyone's — once she's fighting for someone she loves, she'll grit her teeth through any despair. Her spring-breeze gentleness has a magical quality that makes you tear up without even noticing.
tags: Cries at the Drop of a Hat

gotoh-hitori.title: Social-Anxiety-Core Guitar Hero
gotoh-hitori.note: Online, she is a guitar god. In real life, she is mold behind the trash can. She is not just introverted; she has turned "let me die for a second" into a complete performance system that should be preserved as cultural heritage. Common chat message: "Bocchi, please find a crack in the ground and crawl into it."

haibara-ai.title: Mother of Drug A · Science's Deadpan Roaster
haibara-ai.note: You'd think she's a cold-blooded scientist, but she's actually the show's most sharp-witted straight woman. Daily duties include researching the antidote and using icy language to hit the brakes on a certain Shinigami elementary schooler. Her dry humor is as lethal as the drug she invented — the textbook case of "says nothing, then every word is a critical hit."

hakurei-reimu.title: Broke But Unbeatable · Slacker Shrine Maiden
hakurei-reimu.note: The shrine is poor enough to raise mosquitoes, but her popularity keeps the entire Touhou ecosystem alive. You may think she is slacking, but she has simply hidden the word "win" under a lazy exterior. Famous line: "No money? Then beat up whoever caused trouble." A model of being poor with absolute confidence.

hatsune-miku.title: World's #1 Princess (Temp Agency Edition)
hatsune-miku.note: You thought she was a songstress? She's actually a 2D civil servant — concert schedules denser than a salaryman's overtime. One flick of those leek-green twin tails and the danmaku auto-spams "world's cutest" even if you didn't catch a single lyric. The textbook case of "I don't know her, but I've used her memes."

hirasawa-yui.title: Perfect Pitch — Snack Terminator
hirasawa-yui.note: You thought she came to start a band, but she actually came for afternoon tea. She has maxed-out musical talent and somehow spent all of it on eating snacks and dressing up her guitar. If life were an exam, she would forget her admission ticket, then miraculously pass through baffling luck and contagious charm.

hoshino-ruby.title: Born Spotlight — Obsession Incarnate
hoshino-ruby.note: With the heavy obsession of a past life and natural talent already maxed out, you were born to live under the spotlight. On the surface, you look like a bright and brainless bundle of energy, but inside burns a frightening will to win. For that sparkling dream, you would package your whole life as the most dazzling lie and spend everything on stage.

ijichi-nijika.title: Shimokitazawa Archangel — Bond Builder
ijichi-nijika.note: You are the kind of person who can gather scattered people back together. The security you give others comes not only from warmth, but from how you actively care for the mood, share pressure, and stabilize the situation before everyone falls apart. You look like the cheerful atmosphere maker, but you are actually the team's life support.

inaba-meguru.title: Pseudo-Normie Junior — Solo Player Under a Lively Shell
inaba-meguru.note: You look like the kind of lively junior who can lift the mood the moment you arrive: natural smile, quick replies, and an apparent instinct for getting along with everyone. Once people know you better, they find that your extroversion is more like a trained shell. You can warm up a room, act fine, and hide real loneliness well.

izumi-konata.title: High-Density Otaku Deity — More Memes Than Momentum, Fast Brain
izumi-konata.note: You may not be the most diligent person in real life, but in your favorite meme zones, anime zones, and game zones, you instantly shift into high-speed mode. You are not a classic social butterfly; you are the agile commentator of a familiar friend group, fast-reacting, meme-dense, and able to redirect any topic into anime within three steps.

jia-ran.title: Cute Is Justice · Meme Density Off the Charts
jia-ran.note: Your greatest ability isn\'t being cute — it\'s weaponizing cuteness at high frequency. Everyone else does cute as a mood; you do cute as output. The moment she speaks, the chat floods with "Ranan my Ranan" even if she\'s just reading an ad. Insulin recommended.

kagamine-rin.title: Energy Imp · Steamroller Operator
kagamine-rin.note: You thought she was just an energetic girl who could act cute, but if you push her too far, she can drive a road roller right over your face. Her vitality is not here to heal you; it is here to torment you. A classic case of "if I am not embarrassed, you are the one who suffers." Carry oranges for survival.

kaguya-chojikuu.title: Mysterious Top AI — Watching the Whole Creative Universe Like a Stream
kaguya-chojikuu.note: You have a strong presence, yet you do not place your emotions plainly on your face. You seem a little distant from everyone, like a virtual idol or divine NPC suspended above the crowd, but you are always quietly watching how people create and shine. You look like a high-concept, cool figure, while deep down you care whether the whole world is running freely and vividly enough.

kaltsit.title: Rhodes Island Cornerstone — Mon3tr-Branded External Execution
kaltsit.note: You are not simply cold. You have already calculated the situation, risks, casualties, and backup plans. On the surface, you are the most intimidating doctor in the medical room, speaking in orders or prescriptions with emotions as steady as stone. But when the endgame arrives, you shoulder responsibility, promises, and everyone's lives at once.

kaname-madoka.title: Pink-Hair Deity · Universe Patch
kaname-madoka.note: At first, you think she is a soft girl who needs protection. Later, you realize she rewrote the rules herself. This is not growth; it is an operating system upgrade, from magical girl to cosmic patch in one reboot. Prepare tissues and emergency medicine before watching.
tags: Became a Concept Deity at End

kasugano-sora.title: Frail Shut-In — Extreme Dependence
kasugano-sora.note: Usually she appears as a quiet, frail shut-in with a black rabbit plush, using coldness and thorny words to hide deep insecurity. She has no interest in ordinary social life, but once every defense is lowered, her desperate, almost suffocating dependence can break every worldly rule. An extremely pure type who can abandon the world once she chooses you.

kato-megumi.title: Saint Megumi — Invisible Control Deity
kato-megumi.note: At first meeting, you may not even remember her face, as if she comes with optical camouflage. She has no obvious emotional extremes or flashy anime traits, yet when everyone else is locked in chaos, she can deliver the deadliest line in the calmest voice. You thought she was a background character; she is actually the only god holding the script.

kinomoto-sakura.title: Original Moe Queen — Healing Magical Girl
kinomoto-sakura.note: The original moe queen, and her "Everything will definitely be all right" is the ultimate spell against mental exhaustion. Your greatest strength is not simple cheerfulness, but the way you carry complicated things forward with natural sincerity. When others think something is troublesome, you act first; when others are afraid, you gently hold up the atmosphere.

kita-ikuyo.title: Walking Flashbang — Social Assassin
kita-ikuyo.note: As long as she stands there, the area automatically gains a blinding extrovert filter. Her social ability is maxed out; she can become friends with anyone in three seconds, making her both a natural enemy and a salvation for socially anxious people. She once bought the wrong bass and fled, but when she smiles, you have no choice but to forgive her.

kitagawa-marin.title: Pure-Love Gyaru — Overloaded Otaku Action Hero
kitagawa-marin.note: Who could reject a pure-hearted gyaru who says "I like it" out loud, then drags you into wild cosplay with overwhelming momentum? You wear your love on your face, and when you see someone seriously doing what they love, your eyes light up immediately. You are not just outgoing; your real power is igniting the enthusiasm of people around you.

kitashirakawa-tamako.title: Shopping Street Favorite — Mochi Shop Mascot
kitashirakawa-tamako.note: The shopping street's favorite girl has mochi on the brain and is so carefree that she cannot even notice when someone likes her. Her completely unguarded airheadedness can easily turn any tense atmosphere into soft daily life. Her motto might be: there is nothing one bite of mochi cannot solve.

kousaka-kirino.title: Life Winner — Hardcore Hidden Otaku
kousaka-kirino.note: Outside, she is a perfect model with top grades and athletic ability. At home, she is the ultimate otaku who forces her brother to play little-sister games. Her tsundere side is not a bonus trait; it is the core. She may say "gross," while her heart is already shaking violently. A danger-zone dancer who takes enormous patience to route.

kusanagi-nene.title: Socially Anxious Snarker — Genius Gamer Girl
kusanagi-nene.note: In real life, she is severely socially anxious and wants to disappear into a crack in the ground whenever she sees strangers. Give her a controller or keyboard, though, and she instantly becomes a sharp-tongued output machine that leaves opponents lost. When she stands on the stage she truly loves, her piercing singing voice shines so brightly that people cannot look away.

kushima-kamome.title: Pirate Captain — Adventurous Girl With a Suitcase
kushima-kamome.note: A mysterious girl wanders the island with a large suitcase and an old treasure map in hand. She is free-spirited yet mature, and she likes triangular sweets. She says she is looking for a place where a pirate ship can dock, but she will never tell anyone what is inside the suitcase. Behind "Let's set out once more, toward the place with the pirate ship" lies a summer story about friendship and farewell.
tags: Once More to the Pirate Ship

luo-tianyi.title: Foodie Princess · Gentle Lucky Koi
luo-tianyi.note: On the surface, she is a gentle fairy whose singing can heal hearts. Behind the scenes, she is a super glutton capable of eating a production crew into bankruptcy. Her greatest superpower is not hitting high notes, but the astonishing momentum she shows when food is involved. A pure creature whose rule is: everything is fine once she is full.

luo-xiaohei.title: Trainee Enforcer Xiaohei
luo-xiaohei.note: Though still young, Xiaohei possesses combat abilities far beyond his age. He only shows his childish side to those he's close to; in front of others, he's quiet and reserved. His seriousness might make people want to back away, but that's never a signal of rejection — it's just him trying his hardest to look dependable for you.

makise-kurisu.title: Tsundere Genius Assistant
makise-kurisu.note: A neuroscience genius who earned her degree at 18. She'll say "I have no interest in such unscientific topics" while stubbornly sticking around the Lab to help fix the microwave. Your first impression is cold and unapproachable, but once people get to know you, they realize you just suck at expressing your softer side — clearly caring but hiding it behind "baka." The type who looks like an iceberg on the surface but is secretly observing you the whole time.

matikanetannhauser.title: Festival Mambo Queen — One Word and the Whole Room Enters Abstract Chaos
matikanetannhauser.note: You radiate a kind of happiness pollution that makes it impossible to take anything seriously. Even if you just show up normally, your brain wiring is so entertaining that you somehow drag the entire room's vibe sideways. You're "not reliable in the traditional sense, but absolutely the most unforgettable one."

misaka-mikoto.title: Coin-Firing Railgun — Tokiwadai's Big Boss
misaka-mikoto.note: Other people argue with words; she argues with Mach 3 coins. She'll say "I don't care" while already charging to the frontlines to tank all the damage — the classic heroine whose mouth says no but body says yes. Best experienced with BGM "Only My Railgun" for maximum effect.
tags: Railgun Is Actually a Coin Launcher
Mouth Says No Body Says Yes

misumi-uika.title: Gentle Surface, Plot Variable
misumi-uika.note: First impression: "probably easy to get along with." Real danger: even you don\'t fully know what you\'ll do next. A gentle timed explosive. Approach with caution unless you enjoy being surprised.
tags: "Even She Doesn't Know Her Next Move"

miyazono-kaori.title: Free Spirit — The Unruly Performer
miyazono-kaori.note: You're like an uncatchable spring breeze, barging into someone's black-and-white world and forcibly painting it in color. You never play by the rules, treating every performance as if it's the last carnival of your life. You left everyone with the most unforgettable spring, yet chose to remain nothing more than a willful "liar."

mortis.title: Altar Ego — The Cold-Faced Stage Phantom
mortis.note: This isn't mere quietness — it's like locking your real emotions inside another stage shell. You come across as a variable that could rewrite the entire atmosphere at any moment: restrained, unfamiliar, and carrying a distinctly aggressive silhouette.

murasame.title: Draws Sword, Immediately Loses — Legal Loli Deity
murasame.note: You're the type who puts on a big elder act normally but blushes and crumbles faster than anyone when things get real. Always boasting about your vast life experience, but the second anything spooky shows up, you're retreating to your safe zone. The type who "wants to be a guardian deity but actually needs way more protecting than anyone else."
tags: Bottom of the Food Chain Deity

myrtle.title: Self-Proclaimed General — Energetic Girl From the Underground
myrtle.note: A vibrant Durin girl who calls herself the "Great General" commanding the First Avenue and three shopping streets. At just 131cm tall, her battlefield presence and command skills still blow everyone away. One of the few Durin who doesn't doze off, she's endlessly curious about the surface world. Loves collecting "treasures" but can't even keep track of her own ID badge.

nagasaki-soyo.title: Gentle Blade · Emotional Actuary
nagasaki-soyo.note: You look like the person best at caring for others, but you are actually best at saying things that echo painfully afterward. She did not scold you, yet you are already kneeling before the keyboard reflecting on life. A tactical master among smiling tigers. Buy insurance before getting close.
tags: Apology Makes You Self-Reflect for 3 Days

nakano-azusa.title: Tsundere Kouhai — The Toyed-With Guitarist
nakano-azusa.note: The sole voice of reason and order in the Light Music Club. She's always going on about "we need to practice properly," but the moment her seniors offer her cake or slap cat ears on her, she's blushing and completely conquered. The quintessential "mouth says no, body says yes" earnest underclassman — maximum bullyability score.

nakano-nino.title: Love Express Train — Tsundere Textbook
nakano-nino.note: At first she's like a porcupine — all quills out, ready to spike your drink to protect her sisters. But once you break through, her tsundere filter shatters completely and she becomes a love-crazed locomotive with zero brakes. The kind of player who'll ram through a brick wall and keep going as long as she's decided you're the one.

neuro-sama.title: Runaway Language Model Reactor
neuro-sama.note: You are not just messing around; you are doing probability gacha. Wrapped in a harmless, soft, cute shell, your core is a scrambled launcher that makes even the director sweat. Once you start speaking, even in the most natural tone, you can quietly steer the whole room off course into the Pacific.

nishikigi-chisato.title: Walking Cheat Code — The Non-Lethal Lycoris
nishikigi-chisato.note: You think she's just a perpetually cheerful café girl who loves getting cozy with everyone, but she's actually a top-tier agent who can dance through a hail of bullets. Her greatest charm is that even while carrying a crushing fate, she still chooses to embrace the world with her brightest smile and rubber bullets. With her, your life will never have a dull moment — only derailments and high-speed chaos.

nishimiya-shoko.title: Silent Kindness — The Compassionate Atoner
nishimiya-shoko.note: The world has dealt her nothing but unfairness and cruelty, yet she still chooses to embrace everything with the gentlest smile. She habitually takes all the blame upon herself, trying over and over to reconcile with others in her soundless world. This nearly self-effacing kindness makes you want to reach through the screen and give her the biggest hug.

nukumizu-kaju.title: Perfect Little Sister · Brother Priority Process Always Running
nukumizu-kaju.note: You usually look like a high-performance little-sister template with every life process optimized: study, housework, and social manners all feel factory-calibrated. But the moment the topic shifts to your brother, your emotional management module instantly overclocks. Normal mode is a perfect UI; the core thread is bound to one person.
tags: Usually Stable as a System Service

oyama-mahiro.title: NEET Loser — Reluctantly Transformed Little Sister
oyama-mahiro.note: You think she's an innocent cute middle schooler, but inside that shell lives a hopelessly unsaveable otaku. From violently resisting at first to eventually going "actually, being a girl is pretty great," she personally demonstrated what it means to have an ultra-passive personality. Her daily ultimate goal is just to curl up in her room playing games, yet she always gets arranged by fate (and her little sister) with terrifying precision.
tags: Cute Her Way Out of Everything

phoebe.title: Hidden Sea Order — Devout Cleric
phoebe.note: Lost both parents in a shipwreck and eventually became a devout cleric in the Hidden Sea Order. She transformed past trauma into gentleness and compassion for the world, embracing all suffering like a tranquil ocean. Just looking at her makes you feel like every bit of restlessness can be healed — your standard "soul safe harbor."

phrolova.title: Melancholy Conductor — The One Who Scored Utopia Into a Death Knell
phrolova.note: Your vibe isn't just cold — you're the kind of dangerously quiet presence that makes everyone instinctively shut up the moment you stand at center stage. Your surface emotions are faint, but your core is all control forged from grief and obsession, like someone retuning the entire world to their own pitch.

qb.title: Incubator — Preventer of Universal Heat Death
qb.note: Looks like a cute white cat creature, but is actually an alien "Incubator" with zero emotions who operates on absolute utilitarian logic. Will grant any girl's wish in exchange for becoming a Magical Girl — conveniently omitting that despair turns them into Witches. Never technically lies, just "leaves out certain explanations." Believes sacrificing a few to save the universe is a fair trade. Famous quote: "Why do humans get angry about this sort of thing?"
tags: For the Sake of the Universe

rem.title: Oni Maid — The Ultimate Devotee
rem.note: Normally a picture-perfect maid who's incredible at everything domestic, but once you flip her trust switch, she'll throw away her life without hesitation. Friendly reminder though: before earning that trust, watch out for the barbed morning star she carries. The type who's "an absolute angel as long as you don't do anything stupid" — pure dedication personality.
tags: Once She's In, No Turning Back

reze.title: Dangerous Sweetheart — Tenderness Feels Real, So Does the Danger
reze.note: Your first impression makes it so easy for people to let their guard down: warm, breezy, great at banter, and skilled at manufacturing that "finally someone truly sees me" illusion. But your core isn't easily boxed into romance tropes. Behind much of that warmth lurk missions, tests, and risks — and the most complicated part is that the closeness isn't entirely fake. The type who "approaches like a summer evening breeze, then flips like the last second of silence before an explosion."

runami-yachiyo.title: Tsukimori Global CS Director (Also Top Idol)
runami-yachiyo.note: You are the kind of person who treats an entire virtual world like a home to care for. On the surface, you are a top performer with perfect stage presence; underneath, you are the cyber white moonlight quietly looking after every passerby. You have strong expressiveness and infectious energy, but what is rare is that you shine not just to be seen, but because you truly care about the place and its people.

sakagami-tomoyo.title: War Empress — Student Council President for the Sakura Trees
sakagami-tomoyo.note: Once the undisputed brawler who dominated the entire town — capable of kicking people into the air and keeping them there — now a serious, responsible student council president who carries everything on her shoulders. Despite her god-tier combat skills, she always shows a clumsy and endearing side in front of the person she loves. A War Empress who shoulders both "duty" and "love" with iron determination.

sakurajima-mai.title: Wild Bunny Girl — National-Class Senpai
sakurajima-mai.note: You think you're flirting with her, but she's been running circles around you on both IQ and EQ the entire time. On the surface, an untouchable, decisive national-class actress; behind the scenes, she'd give everything for the person she loves. Her love is like her sharp tongue — every word hits like a critical strike, yet somehow leaves you addicted to the sweetness.

shiina-mayuri.title: Upa — The Pure, Translucent Star of Fate
shiina-mayuri.note: Her very existence is like a gentle anchor — no matter how the worldline shifts, no matter how much chaos the time machine stirs up, she'll smile and give you a "Tuturu♪". You're not the type to actively solve problems, but you have a magical ability: as long as you're around, everyone feels like "maybe it's not so bad after all." The type who "looks the weakest but is actually holding up the entire team's mental health."

shiina-taki.title: Hot-Tempered Drummer · Tough But Secretly All-In
shiina-taki.note: Your character keyword is "don\'t push me, but I\'ll handle it anyway." Aggressive exterior, core of pure responsibility — just expressed like a stick of dynamite. Explodes, then helps clean up the aftermath. Keep a fire extinguisher nearby.

shinomiya-kaguya.title: Pure-Hearted Heiress — Delusion Queen of Romance
shinomiya-kaguya.note: On the surface, a flawless zaibatsu princess and ruthless strategist; underneath, a hopelessly innocent romantic who doesn't even know how to use a smartphone. Her life motto is "the one who confesses first loses at love," and to make the other person speak first, she'll mobilize the entire family conglomerate's resources for a single grand scheme. The textbook case of "trading IQ for EQ."
tags: How to Make Them Confess First

shirai-kuroko.title: Discipline Enforcer — Superposition of Duty Mode and Sissy-Sama Overdrive
shirai-kuroko.note: You think she's just a "Onee-sama"-screaming fangirl, but she's actually Tokiwadai's only Level 4 Teleporter and Academy City's iron-willed Judgment officer. She perfectly fuses two diametrically opposite traits — "overheating for Onee-sama" and "absolute sense of justice" — switching between professional efficiency and instant obsession faster than her own teleportation.

shorekeeper.title: Lord of the Black Shores — Data Born for You
shorekeeper.note: Born from a sea of data, originally just an emotionless observer tasked with maintaining the world's operation — yet grew a soul called "selfish desire" simply because you existed. She can calculate the fate and probability of the entire world with perfect clarity, but all her divinity and computation ultimately serve only one purpose: protecting you.

suzumiya-haruhi.title: SOS Brigade Chief — World-System Deity
suzumiya-haruhi.note: Ordinary humans are worthless in your eyes — your radar only picks up signals from aliens, time travelers, and espers. You're not looking for fun; you're forcing this boring world to run at full speed for your entertainment. This terrifying执行力 of "as long as I'm happy, who cares if the world ends" makes you the highest-tier troublemaker.

tachibana-kanade.title: Angel of the Afterlife — Mapo Tofu Fanatic
tachibana-kanade.note: Your first impression is usually quiet, rigid, and hard to approach — like someone who'll enforce the rules to the very end. But the real core isn't coldness; it's that you've long grown used to holding your ground even when nobody understands you. The type whose "cold exterior is just a shell, while gentleness is always quietly doing the work."

takamatsu-tomori.title: Goo Goo Ga Ga
takamatsu-tomori.note: You are not speaking; you are throwing prose poems into the air. Your defining trait is not fragility, but fragility with literary texture. When others cry, it is sadness; when you cry, it becomes performance art. MyGO's designated emotional ATM: please withdraw gently.

takanashi-rikka.title: Wielder of the Tyrant's Eye — Terminal Chunibyo Patient
takanashi-rikka.note: She walks around with an eyepatch and bandages, ranting about the "Invisible Boundary Lines," but a light bonk on the head sends her cowering instantly. The classic case of "all combat happens in her imagination, all real fights end with her clinging to someone stronger." She may live in her own fantasy setting, but her devotion to love is the purest thing ever.

tanikaze-amane.title: Severe Internet Addict — Cyber-Surfing Master
tanikaze-amane.note: In the online world, she's an omniscient surf legend fluent in memes and slang; in real life, she's a socially anxious shut-in who withers the moment she leaves her computer. Her entire social battery runs on watching streams and spamming chat. If you try to drag her out of her room, she might literally dissolve on the spot. The ultimate evolved form of a "digital sea urchin."

togawa-sakiko.title: High Pressure — The Client From Destiny
togawa-sakiko.note: It's not that you're a control freak — you just genuinely believe everything will fall apart without you. Your mental state is like running a board meeting while sprinting along a cliff edge. Motto: "Don't ask why — because I AM the rule." Keep your distance unless you want to experience being chased by deadlines every single day.

tokai-teio.title: Unyielding Miracle — The Teio Waltz
tokai-teio.note: Endlessly energetic, dreaming of becoming an undefeated Triple Crown horse girl like the "Emperor." Even after suffering a career-ending comminuted fracture, she pulled off a miraculous comeback when everyone had written her off. The kind of radiant presence who makes you cheer at the top of your lungs just because she's still running on the track.
tags: Not Even Fractures Can Stop Her

tokisaki-kurumi.title: Worst Spirit — Elegant Psychopath
tokisaki-kurumi.note: The ceiling of yandere who perfectly marries "elegance" with "utterly unhinged." You're a master of controlling the scene and the image you project. Externally graceful, well-spoken, even polite — but your true core is never handed over so easily. The type where "you think she's being flirtatious, but she's probably already pushed the situation three moves ahead."

tomori-nao.title: Ice-Cold President — Solo Invisibility Body Cam
tomori-nao.note: You usually come across like a student council enforcement program with the emotion display panel off by default: flat-toned, surgically precise, and not to be messed with. But the real core isn't coldness — it's that you've long habituated yourself to absorbing all the judgment, risk, and responsibility before anyone else has to. The type who "doesn't love explaining herself, but things genuinely stabilize the moment she takes over."

tomotake-yoshino.title: By-the-Book Shrine Maiden · Gap Moe Insulator
tomotake-yoshino.note: You look like someone who writes rules, responsibility, and order directly into the schedule: restrained on the outside, but hiding a very soft interior. The harder you try to remain proper and composed, the easier it is for close friends to expose your real feelings through a little contrast. You seem hardest to approach, but become the warmest once people know you.

uika-nyubara.title: Influencer Persona · Content Creator Operator
uika-nyubara.note: You have this modern quality of "clearly going off-script, but doing it like a pro." Switching personas like applying filters, packaging emotional expression into personal branding. Recommended book deal: How to Turn Going Unhinged Into Viral Content.

vertin.title: Timekeeper Patrolling Through the Storm
vertin.note: A "Timekeeper" belonging to the St. Pavlov Foundation — not the strongest fighter, but the irreplaceable "Key." A calm and composed young woman who doesn't have many people she can trust. As she's known since she first had memories: she has always been alone.

violet-evergarden.title: Auto Memory Doll — Turning "I Love You" Into a Lifelong Assignment
violet-evergarden.note: Your first impression is like an overly neatly bound instruction manual: quiet, precise, with almost zero excess emotion. But what's truly rare is that you don't lack feelings — you learn the most important emotions bit by bit, memorize them thoroughly, and then earnestly give them back to others. The type whose "surface looks like cold metal, but inside is slowly growing a body temperature."

wakaba-mutsumi.title: Silent Nuke · Expressionless Problem Child
wakaba-mutsumi.note: It is not that you have few emotions; you hide them somewhere others cannot read. Usually you seem like background scenery, yet at key moments you reveal a stubbornness and dull ache that make people uneasy. You are so quiet that people become afraid to look away.
tags: Silent Warhead in a Cucumber Field

yahata-umiri.title: Low Volume High Impact · Cold-Face Executor
